name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The radical left abandons law enforcement
body:
Keeping people safe is the first duty of any government. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8e53ab197d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • June 8, 2020
---
| | |
# **The radical left abandons law enforcement**

**Keeping people safe** is the first duty of any government. Whatever other debates about public policy our country may have, the basic responsibility to protect all citizens from violence has long enjoyed vocal bipartisan support.

**No longer.** Unable to appease or control its radical fringe, Democrats in elected office—from Congress to city mayors—have at last fully surrendered to the mob.

**After extremist proposals** such as defunding immigration enforcement, pushing to eliminate private health plans with “Medicare for All,” and ending American energy dominance with a “Green New Deal,” far-left Democrats ran low on fanatic proposals for their base. The riots gripping America’s cities this month offered a new opportunity.

[Watch: President Trump “appalled” by “defund the police” ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=57569aa06a&e=3ee4985eea)

**First, Democrat leaders** refused to condemn the violence. Next, they joined the mob in condemning U.S. law enforcement officers. At last, they caved to demands.

**“Defund the police.”** Minneapolis’ City Council announced its intent to do it yesterday, and Democrats in Congress now want the rest of America to follow suit.

**After the riots broke out,** about 700 federal, state, and local law enforcement officers sustained injuries. At least 15 people have died, many of them African-American. Countless small businesses have been torched, vandalized, or looted. At least 150 federal buildings have been damaged.

**It’s unacceptable**. Any real leader knows that. The violence and killing must stop.

🎬 [Minneapolis City Council President defends plan to dismantle police](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=70936e4538&e=3ee4985eea)

**President Trump** wasted no time in responding. On June 1, he announced measures to protect peaceful, law-abiding Americans—including letting governors and mayors know that if they didn’t protect their people, the U.S. military would do it for them.

**These efforts** paid off, as most American cities saw violence subside and peaceful protests continue without rioting. National Guard troops are now able to withdraw.

**Before those actions** , the President made it known that racial injustice would not stand. He asked Attorney General Bill Barr to expedite a federal investigation into the killing of George Floyd. President Trump has taken numerous other actions to make our criminal justice system fairer, including signing the [historic First Step Act](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2375bf7c2e&e=3ee4985eea) in 2017.

**Leaving entire communities** to fend for themselves by defunding law enforcement won’t improve criminal justice: It will ensure justice for no one.

🎬 [Press Secretary: No police means “chaos, crime, and anarchy”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4a3a8cc54b&e=3ee4985eea)

**The overwhelming majority** of our police officers are heroes. They’re the ones out on our streets each day to protect peaceful protesters from the violent tactics of Antifa. Bad cops need to be held accountable; good ones need to be protected and supported.

**President Trump** is doing just that. Today, he held a roundtable discussion with law enforcement officials at the White House, where officers discussed [responsible ideas for reform](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ec334b1afb&e=3ee4985eea) and ways for police officers to act as better friends for their communities.

**Democrats should follow** the President’s leadership, stand up for good police officers, and stop bowing to the insanity of their party’s radical, dangerous fringe.

[WATCH: President Trump meets with law enforcement officials at White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=31821311e7&e=3ee4985eea)

**🇺🇸****READ:**[Trump’s National Guard ‘Surge’ Allowed Protesters to ‘Demonstrate Safely’](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=55a78181e8&e=3ee4985eea)
---

name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Check-Up with Dr. Manny 6/8
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
Friends,

It's been another great week being back on our big orange RV, traveling the state, and meeting so many great conservatives.

This past week back on the road, I visited Washington, Sullivan, Hancock, Claiborne, Union, Wilson, Cannon, DeKalb, Pickett, Fentress, Cumberland, Robertson, Montgomery, and Houston Counties.

I thoroughly enjoyed my time meeting with local mayors and great conservatives around our state.

One thing I've heard this week from all over is concern over the rioting and looting we've seen across the state and the country. Let me be clear - ANTIFA is a domestic terrorist organization and should be labeled and treated as such.

Many folks are still understandably anxious about COVID-19 and its potential spread. While I am traveling the state, we will be doing so wisely and maintain social distancing protocols.

As always, if you have any questions or I can help in any way, please feel free to email me directly at [http://manny@drmannyforsenate.com].

Events:

This week, I'll be doing townhalls in Dyer [https://www.facebook.com/events/627593407831718/?acontext=%7B%22source%22%3A5%2C%22action_history%22%3A[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22page%22%2C%22mechanism%22%3A%22main_list%22%2C%22extra_data%22%3A%22%5C%22[]%5C%22%22%7D]%2C%22has_source%22%3Atrue%7D], Weakley [https://www.facebook.com/events/560068418032513/?acontext=%7B%22source%22%3A5%2C%22action_history%22%3A[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22page%22%2C%22mechanism%22%3A%22main_list%22%2C%22extra_data%22%3A%22%5C%22[]%5C%22%22%7D]%2C%22has_source%22%3Atrue%7D], Grainger [https://www.facebook.com/events/666250504229833/?acontext=%7B%22source%22%3A5%2C%22action_history%22%3A[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22page%22%2C%22mechanism%22%3A%22main_list%22%2C%22extra_data%22%3A%22%5C%22[]%5C%22%22%7D]%2C%22has_source%22%3Atrue%7D], and Sevier [https://www.facebook.com/events/2376429232654860/?acontext=%7B%22source%22%3A5%2C%22action_history%22%3A[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22page%22%2C%22mechanism%22%3A%22main_list%22%2C%22extra_data%22%3A%22%5C%22[]%5C%22%22%7D]%2C%22has_source%22%3Atrue%7D] Counties. I'll be sharing why I'm running for Senate and taking your questions, and I hope you'll join us.

Stay up to date with where we'll be next at DrMannyForSenate.com/Events [https://www.drmannyforsenate.com/events]

News:

Last week, I was incredibly proud to receive Senator Rand Paul's endorsement. Senator Paul has been a champion of the conservative cause and I greatly admire him. I'm honored to receive his support in my run for US Senate. Read the full release here! [https://www.drmannyforsenate.com/senator-rand-paul-endorses-dr-manny-sethi-for-senate]

I'm also incredibly proud to receive the endorsement of former Congressman Ed Bryant. Congressman Bryant has served our state with tenacity and selflessness. He's a man I look up to, and I am honored to receive his support.

Social Media:

We had a great week of townhalls starting off with a few hundred of our closest friends in Coffee County last week. Thank you to the folks that came out to support me and my run for US Senate. It's going to be a great summer and I look forward to seeing you out on the road! Keep an eye on our Facebook [https://facebook.com/Dr-Manny-for-Senate-2265971750329892] and [http://drmannyforsenate.com/events] to see where I'll be going next!

Follow us on Facebook [https://facebook.com/Dr-Manny-for-Senate-2265971750329892], Twitter [https://twitter.com/DrMannySenate], and Instagram [https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq2O9AypdDz9RqFaPEHuCiQ] to keep up with all that we are doing during this pandemic. We aren't slowing this campaign down as we work towards victory in August!

I believe Tennesseans should meet their next US Senator, and why I hope to see you soon.

Dr. Manny

P.S. There are only 59 days until Election Day! A donation right now will help me reach the US Senate and be a true representative of YOU, instead of a Washington insider.

DoNATe herE [https://manny.revv.co/donate]

Copyright © 2019 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.

Our mailing address is:

PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205

---
Dear Friend, Last month I participated in a candidate evaluation forum with the Texas Farm Bureau. The TFB spoke with my Libertarian and Republican opponents as well as myself, with the goal of identifying a candidate to endorse before the runoffs. The TFB approach is a little unusual. Most organizations look to endorse a candidate in a particular party's primary rather than choose a candidate from across all parties. We received word yesterday that the TFB has opted to remain neutral in this race, at least through the runoff. Why is a "no endorsement" decision such a big win? Because the TFB has endorsed Pete Sessions and Bill Flores multiple times in the past. It would have been very easy for them to endorse Sessions again. Their neutral stance is understandable given that agriculture has taken a beating under this administration's policies. And it confirms our assertion that key sectors of the electorate are open to hearing a new message. __Our__ message. clean_body: A BIG Win! | Rick Kennedy (D-Central Texas) is running for the open seat in the 17th District.= Dear Friend, Last month I participated in a candidate evaluation forum with the Texas Farm Bureau. The TFB spoke with my Libertarian and Republican opponents as well as myself, with the goal of identifying a candidate to endorse before the runoffs. The TFB approach is a little unusual. Most organizations look to endorse a candidate in a particular party's primary rather than choose a candidate from across all parties. We received word yesterday that the TFB has opted to remain neutral in this race, at least through the runoff. Why is a "no endorsement" decision such a big win? Because the TFB has endorsed Pete Sessions and Bill Flores multiple times in the past. It would have been very easy for them to endorse Sessions again. Their neutral stance is understandable given that agriculture has taken a beating under this administration's policies. And it confirms our assertion that key sectors of the electorate are open to hearing a new message. Our message. Help us amplify the message. =. If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | =** Thank you, and stay safe. Rick | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress Rick Kennedy for Congress 2203 Emmett Pkwy Austin, TX 78726 To unsubscribe, please .

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Last chance: Sign this letter to President Trump!
body:
| |
---
I have an urgent request for you today. **[Would you please consider adding your name to a letter to President Trump and Vice President Pence asking for the CDC to revise and redraft the guidelines for opening schools?](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTYxLWYxNTA0OTMzMDQ3ZjRkZWE4ZTIyODgwNDlkODc0NGEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZGlBSnJCUjUyQXo4SDJWM2QxSVNDZWo4REZLWmFFajNQZmVvdzBaal9DX2dQRWJBL3ZpZXdmb3JtP21pZD00MjE2NyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=HZc6Z2INY5JyjrNSj0Zvgg)**

This is an important step in reopening our country. We can debate the merits of public education at a different time, but if our children are forced to go back to school in masks, separated from each other, not allowed to share things or even play in close proximity together, it will cause severe psychological harm to an entire generation of Americans. We must prevent that from happening.

These guidelines were also formed when we had less information about the virus and need to be revised (or thrown out altogether) with our new understanding. New data suggests the virus rarely spreads from asymptomatic patients. Children, in most cases are asymptomatic and the new data reveals that the likelihood of the virus spreading from children is minimal, therefore we should not place these stringent and restrictive guidelines on our children.

In Georgia and other states in the southeast, school usually starts the first week in August. School boards are already meeting to figure out how to reopen. It is time-sensitive for these school boards to have updated guidance. **The text of the letter is below my signature. **This letter will be a letter from physicians, teachers, group leaders, parents, grandparents, activists, and others.

**If you are willing to sign the letter to the President asking the CDC to revise the school reopening guidelines,[please use this form to sign the letter](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTYxLWYxNTA0OTMzMDQ3ZjRkZWE4ZTIyODgwNDlkODc0NGEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZGlBSnJCUjUyQXo4SDJWM2QxSVNDZWo4REZLWmFFajNQZmVvdzBaal9DX2dQRWJBL3ZpZXdmb3JtP21pZD00MjE2NyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=kHNQm3pX3VjCAb71TFs8hw).** _Additionally, please forward this email to anyone you think would want to sign the letter and copy and paste the email and letter along with the link to sign it on social media._ The letter is from physicians, teachers, group leaders, parents, grandparents, activists, and others.

If you haven’t seen the CDC guidelines for reopening schools, [you can view them on the CDC website](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTYxLWYxNTA0OTMzMDQ3ZjRkZWE4ZTIyODgwNDlkODc0NGEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2RjLmdvdi9jb3JvbmF2aXJ1cy8yMDE5LW5jb3YvY29tbXVuaXR5L3NjaG9vbHMtY2hpbGRjYXJlL3NjaG9vbHMuaHRtbD9taWQ9NDIxNjcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=vNs3EFWSvOVjbdUf-Cf82Q).

Thank you!

Jenny Beth Martin
**LETTER TO PRESIDENT TRUMP AND VICE PRESIDENT PENCE**
On May 19, the CDC issued a new document, “Considerations for Schools,” offering what it calls “considerations for ways in which schools can help protect students, teachers, administrators, and staff and slow the spread of COVID-19.” We have reviewed these “considerations,” and find them wholly out of touch with the way people live in the real world that is America in 2020. They are totally unworkable, and we urge senior officials to review and revise these new CDC “considerations” to bring them into line with how real people live.

To begin, acknowledge that schools are one of the fundamental bedrocks of our society. They educate our next generation, not just on the basics of reading, writing, and arithmetic, but on the shared values that inhere in our culture. They prepare our next generation to be productive members of society – a society that will not always allow for social distancing, staggered scheduling, herding into small groups, and the like. The real world can be a rough place, and we do our children a disservice if we fail to properly prepare them for it.

Moreover, for most working parents with children in school, school is not just about education. Having children in school means a parent can go to work secure in the knowledge that his or her child or children are in a safe place, overseen by responsible adults, while they’re at work. And for some, it even means the knowledge that their child or children will be eating well, thanks to our school nutrition programs.

Consequently, keeping schools closed is simply not an option. Schools must reopen in the fall – and they must reopen in a manner that acknowledges all we’ve learned about COVID-19. That means taking into account what is reasonable to expect of children of school age, and not assuming it is in their nature to behave in as regimented a manner as the authors of the CDC “considerations” seem to think possible.

In fact, the CDC “considerations” seem so strange, it’s as if they were written by a technocrat in Washington, DC who’s never seen children in a school setting before. You’re going to enforce social distancing on a playground or in gym class? Impossible. You’re going to order children not to use the jungle gyms, the slides, the horizontal ladders, and the carousels, because they cannot be disinfected between each use? And we are expected to believe this will succeed without the use of force? Try telling a nine-year-old he can’t climb on the horizontal ladders, or a five-year-old she can’t use the slide. Good luck with that.

The CDC’s guidelines stipulate reconfiguring classrooms so each child faces forward, eliminating most face-to-face contact. This mandate is straight out of a dystopian science fiction novel. In fact, one doctor has commented to that effect. Dr. Jane Hughes in San Antonio, Texas, believes the CDC recommendations create a “dystopian environment for our children,” far more devastating than the low risk posed by COVID-19 to young people. ([youtu.be/dIcrmYdwn8A](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTYxLWYxNTA0OTMzMDQ3ZjRkZWE4ZTIyODgwNDlkODc0NGEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9kSWNybVlkd244QT9taWQ9NDIxNjcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=hAoTIY6RXwg_-gPGlLkAWw) and [youtu.be/tMpOv9LAq3E](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTYxLWYxNTA0OTMzMDQ3ZjRkZWE4ZTIyODgwNDlkODc0NGEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS90TXBPdjlMQXEzRT9taWQ9NDIxNjcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=0yEYdSIrI9xWVMeTSHsyrw))

Speaking of that low risk to young people, what is most troubling is that the “considerations” are not anchored in science. They seem not have considered that the virus simply is not very much of a threat to young people under the age of 25, and certainly not a threat to children under the age of 15.

Further, we find it disturbing that at a time of budget shortfalls at the state and local levels, implementing the CDC “considerations” would require significant new and additional spending. We’ve already significantly increased government spending – and the concomitant burden on taxpayers – beyond reason as a function of governments’ lockdown responses and the resulting shock to our economy.

Perhaps most disturbingly, the CDC “considerations” do not acknowledge the CDC’s own updated findings that say the virus spreads mainly from person to person, rather than from contaminated surfaces. Does the CDC even read its own ever-changing guidelines and findings? If the CDC isn’t paying attention to what it releases to the public, why should we?

The CDC considerations further demonstrate a lack of real-world understanding in the section on masks. “Teach and reinforce use of cloth face coverings. ... Face coverings should be worn by staff and students (particularly older students) as feasible, and are most essential in times when physical distancing is difficult. Individuals should be frequently reminded not to touch the face covering and to wash their hands frequently. Information should be provided to staff, students, and students’ families on proper use, removal, and washing of cloth face coverings.”

This insistence on masks flies in the face of data, science, and common sense. A study that appeared in _The New England Journal of Medicine_ on May 21st reports that masks provide “little, if any, protection from infection.” Furthermore, the possibility of “catching COVID-19 from a passing interaction in a public space is therefore minimal.” So, why the insistence on masks? The article provides this explanation: “In many cases, the desire for widespread masking is a reflexive reaction to anxiety over the pandemic.”1

So, to be clear: We are asking that our children be forced to cover their faces for up to eight hours a day simply because the CDC has so frightened us that there is now a prevalent and “reflexive reaction to anxiety” during this time? Surely our children deserve better than anxiety-induced reflexive, rather than thoughtful, reactions.

At this point, the United States is far behind our European counterparts. Not only did our children here have to forego classroom instruction for the last three months of the school year and skip graduation ceremonies, but we hear from school districts across the nation that, guided by the CDC’s unrealistic guidelines, they are not even sure schools can resume in the fall. This is nonsense, and Europe proves it. Schools will not only be open in Europe in the fall, but, recognizing that school attendance is foundational to a functioning society, many European countries reopened their schools.2 Given what we know about the low infection rates among children, it is hardly surprising that these countries have found zero increase in the spread of infection as a result of the schools being reopened.

Doctors have spoken out on the dangers of the extended lockdowns, and, in particular, their effect on children of school age. Said Dr. Jeffrey Kornitzer a pediatric neurologist from New Jersey, “Just today, I saw a child paralyzed with fear because he couldn’t figure out if he should wear his mask because his mother kept saying, ‘Well, if you don’t wear the mask, you’re going to catch coronavirus and you’re gonna die,’ and at the same time the kid has sensory issues, every time he put it on he wanted to crawl out of his skin.” ([youtu.be/usRD4QIjSNM](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTYxLWYxNTA0OTMzMDQ3ZjRkZWE4ZTIyODgwNDlkODc0NGEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS91c1JENFFJalNOTT9taWQ9NDIxNjcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=4raD4rrW9eptbaRos3YW4w))

And Dr. Mark McDonald, a child, adolescent, and adult psychiatrist in Los Angeles, says, “The risk of death in children from flu, from seasonal flu, is 20 to 30 times higher than that of the coronavirus, and yet we have never closed schools, we have never asked children or teachers to wear masks, to play separately, to eat separately, to arrive and leave separately from schools because of the flu. And now we’re doing that for the coronavirus, which, essentially, does not affect children ... In my opinion, this is child abuse. I am absolutely appalled, and I think it makes no scientific or rational sense whatsoever.” ([youtu.be/tTi8Wn_NiOg](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTYxLWYxNTA0OTMzMDQ3ZjRkZWE4ZTIyODgwNDlkODc0NGEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS90VGk4V25fTmlPZz9taWQ9NDIxNjcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=Y45Z8MPxROmAjdeCL2nOwA))

We agree. The CDC “considerations” are entirely inappropriate, and must be rewritten from top to bottom.
|
---
[1] Michael Klompas, M.D., M.P.H., Charles A. Morris, M.D., M.P.H., Julia Sinclair, M.B.A., Madelyn Pearson, D.N.P., R.N., and Erica S. Shenoy, M.D., Ph.D., “Universal Masking in Hospitals in the Covid-19 Era,” The New England Journal of Medicine, 21 May 2020. [https://www.nejm.org/doi/full/10.1056/NEJMp2006372](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTYxLWYxNTA0OTMzMDQ3ZjRkZWE4ZTIyODgwNDlkODc0NGEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmVqbS5vcmcvZG9pL2Z1bGwvMTAuMTA1Ni9ORUpNcDIwMDYzNzI_bWlkPTQyMTY3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=3QtmQ7FcHCR2nSjfgvJezw)

[2] Bojan Pancevski and Naja Dandanell, “Is it safe to reopen schools? These countries say yes,” The Wall Street Journal, 31 May 2020. [https://www.wsj.com/articles/is-it-safe-to-reopen-schools-these-countries-say-yes-11590928949](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTYxLWYxNTA0OTMzMDQ3ZjRkZWE4ZTIyODgwNDlkODc0NGEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud3NqLmNvbS9hcnRpY2xlcy9pcy1pdC1zYWZlLXRvLXJlb3Blbi1zY2hvb2xzLXRoZXNlLWNvdW50cmllcy1zYXkteWVzLTExNTkwOTI4OTQ5P21pZD00MjE2NyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=67fq-n5rJ1tN-O7UzC95fA)
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTYxLWYxNTA0OTMzMDQ3ZjRkZWE4ZTIyODgwNDlkODc0NGEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2FjdGlvbi5vcmcvZG9uYXRlLz9taWQ9NDIxNjcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=AcoQaUPn84t0Atbvbppq2Q)
|

clean_body: | | I have an urgent request for you today. This is an important step in reopening our country. We can debate the merits of public education at a different time, but if our children are forced to go back to school in masks, separated from each other, not allowed to share things or even play in close proximity together, it will cause severe psychological harm to an entire generation of Americans. We must prevent that from happening. These guidelines were also formed when we had less information about the virus and need to be revised (or thrown out altogether) with our new understanding. New data suggests the virus rarely spreads from asymptomatic patients. Children, in most cases are asymptomatic and the new data reveals that the likelihood of the virus spreading from children is minimal, therefore we should not place these stringent and restrictive guidelines on our children. In Georgia and other states in the southeast, school usually starts the first week in August. School boards are already meeting to figure out how to reopen. name: Kathy Landing for Congress
subject: Today is Election Day
body:
| | | | Good morning, Lowcountry neighbors! It is 7:00 AM, and the polls are now open...
---
---
Email not displaying correctly? [View it](https://sg-mktg._0FcOw5ZKMXDwltsV4g==) in your browser.
---
Good morning, Lowcountry neighbors! It is 7:00 AM, and the polls are now open! I am emailing you this morning to ensure you know that the polls are open from 7:00 AM to 7:00 PM today and to ask you again to please contact at least 5 friends ASAP and encourage them to vote for our campaign. While we have shared the event details on social media, we wanted to make sure you know that our campaign is hosting our Election Night Party this evening in Mount Pleasant. The details are on the image below.
---
---
If you are able to make it, we will love seeing you to thank you in person for the prayers, encouragement and support shown this past year. If you are unable to attend, on behalf of Joe and our entire family, I thank you for the incredible support as we have gone on this campaign journey and ask for your continued prayers. While we are hopeful to secure the Republican nomination tonight, we acknowledge the very real possibility of a runoff election in two weeks. Regardless of the outcome tonight, I humbly thank you for all you have done. Again, please ensure all of your family, neighbors, and friends vote for us today.
---
---

clean_body: | | | | Good morning, Lowcountry neighbors! It is 7:00 AM, and the polls are now open... Email not displaying correctly? == in your browser. Good morning, Lowcountry neighbors! It is 7:00 AM, and the polls are now open! I am emailing you this morning to ensure you know that the polls are open from 7:00 AM to 7:00 PM today and to ask you again to please contact at least 5 friends ASAP and encourage them to vote for our campaign. While we have shared the event details on social media, we wanted to make sure you know that our campaign is hosting our Election Night Party this evening in Mount Pleasant. The details are on the image below. If you are able to make it, we will love seeing you to thank you in person for the prayers, encouragement and support shown this past year. If you are unable to attend, on behalf of Joe and our entire family, I thank you for the incredible support as we have gone on this campaign journey and ask for your continued prayers. While we are hopeful to secure the Republican nomination tonight, we acknowledge the very real possibility of a runoff election in two weeks. Regardless of the outcome tonight, I humbly thank you for all you have done. Again, please ensure all of your family, neighbors, and friends vote for us today. | Kathy Landing Conservative Republican for Congress | "Facebook " | "Twitter " ---|--- | | Kathy Landing for Congress PO Box 31338 Charleston, SC 29417 | _

body:
Today is Election Day | | | [View In Your Browser](https://mailchi.mp/2fec85a0e3a3/send-a-trump-ally-to-congress-2036005?e=f1831b4ca2) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=db1aa8f46e&e=f1831b4ca2)

---
| | Friends,

The _**polls have just opened**_ and we are hoping for a big turnout today!

If you haven’t voted and need help find your polling place you can do so **[HERE](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=13df2174ab&e=f1831b4ca2)**.

It all comes down to who shows up today. ** Please make sure _you and all of your friends_ come out! **

We have run a hard and a positive campaign that I’m very proud of. We have spent nearly a year **knocking doors, making calls, doing events, putting out policies and ideas. **

No one has put forth specific conservative reform plans. _**No one has worked harder.**_

**And no one else has the grassroots support from _people like you_. **

I’m hoping for a big victory tonight. But right now, I just want to say two things - thank you, and **go VOTE** if you haven’t already.

---
|

name: Team Fair Fight Action
subject: Information on voting in today's primary election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa467/34a064cc/1b842628/7028754/3928241034/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Hi Friend, Today is Georgia's primary Election Day, and we want to make sure you have the information you need. **Still have your absentee ballot?** Absentee ballots must be received by your county Elections Office by 7:00 PM TODAY, Tuesday June 9 in order to count. If you haven't returned your absentee ballot yet, complete it and deliver it to your county Elections Office or a drop box right away. Do not send it by mail. [Click here to find your county elections office and drop box locations.](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa467/34a064cc/1b842628/7028755/3928241034/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.georgiademocrat.org/vote/find-my-countys-ballot-drop-boxes/") **Requested your absentee ballot but haven 't received it? **We want to hear from you. Please call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816 to get help, and then [click here to fill out this form](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa467/34a064cc/1b842628/7028752/3928241034/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://forms.gle/fSL7T781SAk5a8RKA") to tell us your story. Keep in mind that in-person voting is happening today, and you can vote in person today if you did not receive your ballot. **Voting in person today?** Polls are open from 7:00 AM to 7:00 PM. To find your voting location, call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816. If you have any questions or need any help voting, please call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816. Thank you, Fair Fight Action
---

clean_body: | "" | | | Hi Friend, Today is Georgia's primary Election Day, and we want to make sure you have the information you need. Still have your absentee ballot? Absentee ballots must be received by your county Elections Office by 7:00 PM TODAY, Tuesday June 9 in order to count. If you haven't returned your absentee ballot yet, complete it and deliver it to your county Elections Office or a drop box right away. Do not send it by mail. "" Requested your absentee ballot but haven 't received it? We want to hear from you. Please call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816 to get help, and then "" to tell us your story. Keep in mind that in-person voting is happening today, and you can vote in person today if you did not receive your ballot. Voting in person today? Polls are open from 7:00 AM to 7:00 PM. To find your voting location, call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816. If you have any questions or need any help voting, please call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816. Thank you, Fair Fight Action | "" "" "" 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-430 Atlanta, GA 30307 (C)2020 Fair Fight Action, All rights reserved Contributions to Fair Fight Action are not tax-deductible. name: Terry Neese
subject: Restoring our economy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Neese for Congress [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, When I got in this race for Congress, I was worried about what our country would be like for our kids and grandkids if the Democrats were allowed to continue their march toward socialism. Now, I am still worried about that, but the last few months have presented their own challenges. Because of COVID-19, millions of hard working Americans are now unemployed and our historic economic growth under President Trump has come to a halt. But it doesn't have to stay that way. **We can get Oklahomans and Americans back to work, but we are going to need a Congress that is willing to work with our President to do it.** I am asking for your vote on June 30th because I know I have the experience necessary to help President Trump restore our economy and bring back American jobs. [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/0NaPym1geMxUD892qR1657oA/8y67631W8925pjXyEF08ZRFA892A) **As a small businesswoman, I spent my career fighting tooth and nail to get Oklahomans high-quality, good paying jobs where their hard work would be rewarded. ** Now, I am ready to do it again by bringing that business experience to Washington. [If you agree we need to bring business experience to Washington, can I count on you to help our campaign today by donating $5, $10, or $25?](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/0NaPym1geMxUD892qR1657oA/8y67631W8925pjXyEF08ZRFA892A) Families across this nation are hurting and are being failed by the same career politicians with the same ineffective solutions as before. This November, we have a chance to change that. **The people of the 5th District deserve a representative who knows how to get us back to work and will stand with President Trump to make it happen.** As always, thank you for your continued support. Terry Neese
[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/ZCEbEaTMu6V6zjKR892LrAvw/8y67631W8925pjXyEF08ZRFA892A) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/f5SPN44auUBl30sOxg6HxQ/8y67631W8925pjXyEF08ZRFA892A)

Terry Neese * P.O. Box 12744 Oklahoma City, OK 73157 Paid for by Neese for Congress

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: Defund Democrats
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Friends, Sometimes I feel like I’m living on a different planet. Don’t you? Policies that were once considered radical are becoming mainstream, even in the House of Representatives. This past week, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez called for defunding the NYPD’s $6 billion budget. My opponent Max Rose marched alongside signs that said “Blue Lives Murder,” “Ameri-KKK-a," and protestors that chanted “Defund the Police.” And his “friend“ Ilhan Omar —the one he says he “shares values” with —has called for the complete dismantling of her local police department.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=170A237A1A3072)
---
| | |
---
| | Friends-

Sometimes I feel like I’m living on a different planet. Don’t you?

Policies that were once considered radical are becoming mainstream, even in the House of Representatives.

This past week, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez called for defunding the NYPD’s $6 billion budget. My opponent Max Rose marched alongside signs that said “Blue Lives Murder,” “Ameri-KKK-a," and protestors that chanted “Defund the Police.” And his “friend“ Ilhan Omar —the one he says he “shares values” with —has called for the complete dismantling of her local police department.

This is after all three of them voted last month to release convicted murderers and rapists from federal prisons.
---
| | |
---
| | [ DEFEAT AOC, MAX ROSE, AND ILHAN OMAR ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=170A237A1A3073)
---
| | |
---
| | This isn’t about politics, this is about our elected representatives not supporting law and order.

Our brave NYPD officers have put their lives on the line to stop rioters from attacking citizens, starting fires, looting stores, and destroying small businesses.

And we have elected officials that want to defund and dismantle our police? Are you kidding me?

We have challenges in our country, but we can fix them together, peacefully. We can disagree on politics and we can disagree on policies, but there is absolutely no room for our leaders to back policies that let violent criminals take over our cities.

[When I started running for Congress, it was to preserve the American Dream, create good paying jobs, reform our healthcare, and bring no-nonsense leadership to Washington.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=170A237A1A3073)

---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---
| | | [ DONATE NOW ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=170A237A1A3073)
---
| | | [ VOLUNTEER ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=170A237A1A3074)
---
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| | Now, I’m running to literally keep dangerous criminals off our streets and keep our neighborhoods from burning down after being overrun with rioters.

And when we win - [and we will win with your help](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=170A237A1A3073) \- we’ll make sure that protecting your family and your community is the first priority.

---
| | Sincerely,

---
| |
---
| | Nicole Malliotakis

---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | [ CHIP IN $10 ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=170A237A1A3076)
---

#
We are honored to invite you to join State Senator Melinda Bush (IL-31) as she hosts our candidate, Dani Brzozowski, for a virtual fundraising reception via Zoom on June 16th at 6 pm CST. [RSVP to the event here.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=85bb73ea9b&e=140a9b81e7)

Senator Bush has been a leader in the Illinois Senate from the second she took her oath of office, so we are thrilled to have her support in this race. Her signature piece of legislation, the Reproductive Health Act, [guaranteed abortion rights for all women in Illinois and moved our state forward.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=506b95db90&e=140a9b81e7)

**Having a strong leader like Senator Bush on our side makes us proud, and we hope you will join her on the 16th to learn more about why she is on #TeamDani!**

Friend,

It’s past time for Democrat Mayors and Governors to get tough. Violent thugs are running rampant - these people are ANARCHISTS.

While the Fake News has been inciting hatred and chaos, President Trump is working around the clock to restore LAW AND ORDER in these communities where liberal leadership has FAILED.

name: Cornyn Alert
subject: Who's picking our judges?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Sen. Cornyn has been voting to confirm judges to lifetime positions after they donated to his campaign.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901ea/7f51f7bc/4eeca765/4ef6f021/711482651/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901ea/7f51f7bc/4eeca765/4ef6f020/711482651/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1MjQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200609.1nd__1524__&amount=10")
---
Peter --

**FIRST:** Sen. Cornyn and his D.C. boss, Mitch McConnell, **refused to even hold a hearing** for Merrick Garland -- supposedly because it was a presidential election year.

**THEN:** They installed young, highly ideological judges to lifetime positions on the Supreme Court and federal bench, where their decisions could have **DISASTROUS consequences** for our health care, reproductive rights, and more _for decades to come._

**AND:** Several of those judges had **previously donated to Sen. Cornyn 's campaign.**

**NOW: Sen. Cornyn is saying he'd fill any Supreme Court vacancy this year, even though the November election is right around the corner!**
**[PITCH IN TO HELP MJ DEFEAT SEN. CORNYN](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901ea/7f51f7bc/4eeca765/4ef6f020/711482651/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1MjQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200609.1nd__1524__&amount=10")**
**SO: We need [your help](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901ea/7f51f7bc/4eeca765/4ef6f020/711482651/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1MjQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200609.1nd__1524__&amount=10") to defeat Sen. Cornyn, flip the Senate, and ensure that the people confirmed for life terms on the federal bench are there because they're qualified -- not because they donated to Sen. Cornyn's campaign. **

At a time when the courts are deciding the fate of the Affordable Care Act, access to reproductive health care, and so much more, we need a senator who votes for everyday Texans -- not for his donors, not for corporate PACs, and not for Big Pharma -- but for the people.

**Will you pitch in to help MJ defeat Sen. Cornyn this November?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Team Tomlinson
subject: BREAKING: Georgia voter suppression (AGAIN!)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17803139/207091465/-2040532?refcode=em060920-header&refcode2=d943e977-7caa-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTQzZTk3Ny03Y2FhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ezrYQfabWFqJLEWtVZKK-ra2Xzy-yWRZ1qpmnflHMvU=) **** | | It’s infuriating, friend, and the only two possible explanations are incompetence or voter suppression.

Hundreds of people have been waiting to vote for hours. Voting machines were not working when the polls opened at 7 am this morning. Precincts have run out of provisional ballots.

It’s a repeat of the 2018 election when then-Secretary of State Brian Kemp was both a referee and a player in the game. Now amidst the coronavirus pandemic, the decision to shut down polling stations and pack voters into confined areas without the resources to exercise their constitutional right to vote in a timely way is both a civil rights violation _and_ a threat to public health.

**We’re outraged, friend. As we prepare for a late night or even days for results, as we prepare for a potential runoff to take on David Perdue, we must organize the largest get-out-the-vote operation in the history of Georgia to overcome this unacceptable voter suppression and win back the Senate majority.**

[**Make a donation to our Election Runoff Fund with only hours to go before the polls close tonight. We have to fight back — there isn’t a moment to spare.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17803140/207091466/-2040532?refcode=em060920&refcode2=d943e977-7caa-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTQzZTk3Ny03Y2FhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ezrYQfabWFqJLEWtVZKK-ra2Xzy-yWRZ1qpmnflHMvU=) | | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: | | | | = ** | | It’s infuriating, friend, and the only two possible explanations are incompetence or voter suppression. Hundreds of people have been waiting to vote for hours. Voting machines were not working when the polls opened at 7 am this morning. Precincts have run out of provisional ballots. It’s a repeat of the 2018 election when then-Secretary of State Brian Kemp was both a referee and a player in the game. Now amidst the coronavirus pandemic, the decision to shut down polling stations and pack voters into confined areas without the resources to exercise their constitutional right to vote in a timely way is both a civil rights violation and a threat to public health. We’re outraged, friend. As we prepare for a late night or even days for results, as we prepare for a potential runoff to take on David Perdue, we must organize the largest get-out-the-vote operation in the history of Georgia to overcome this unacceptable voter suppression and win back the Senate majority. = | | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = Thank you for everything. —Team Tomlinson PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906 =

Friend --

In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[make a donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17803185/207092032/1147193815?refcode=em-200609-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDQ1NzljYS03Y2FhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eDmyfUtRjrkxHccfgRe9KTFV5zUOr5Y2yeC8JJymDL0=) **to Georgette Gómez’s campaign for Congress. But first, I hope you’ll let me explain why I’m asking, and your support is so important.

Working families across the country are being squeezed to their absolute breaking points. Young people are drowning in student debt. Parents are out of work and struggling to afford rent. Single moms are worried about paying for prescriptions or putting food on the table.

If it wasn’t clear before, this crisis has highlighted the need for big, structural change in this country. Right now, that means stemming the outbreak and ensuring economic relief in the short term. But in the long term, we _need_ to restructure our economy to work for our working families -- not giant corporations and special interests.

Which brings me back to my friend Georgette:

As San Diego’s City Council President, Georgette has a proven track record on key issues like fighting to expand affordable housing and taking action on climate change. She’s spent her career in public service, and has shown great courage and foresight amidst this crisis. I know she’ll be an incredible ally in Congress.

**[I am proud to add my voice to the broad coalition supporting Georgette. name: Mondaire Jones
subject: A statistical dead heat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
Last week, we got polling showing this race as a statistical dead heat. But while other campaigns are starting to stall, our momentum just keeps building. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xq2bJJvMDDA0MOWZ1vepKyaUVfCiOBPxee0o02-eR3_amNusD4JAJkBgTa3bhy92q66m8-iKboqKLSLWEjLtGtfwWvHHPy5nhPvoc8pCeY9-Y4Ug57fDsIpolNnkcZ7OCzjtX1VNr6hF9h_mkGd3UDRcYBQKZaPhNVybvexTWbd-6tQ8z8R9R2rA5azecE8dyoWDs6yAmJpTKis1_28IziaSbZBJkt5NtcYF_HFZPDKhV5qEREHq_Pt45GdSaTukaPhrekzLf8BAPzOkHVo1n-slB57GeQTJRahplSDBdUoA/32h/yAdP87XwTtyuXK1ZuOHg-g/h0/d_SDXob_yohP6yGF_QrfcYHjzpvtGEiRFTVJB936Uck) Friend, **** **** **** Last week, we got polling showing this race as **_a statistical dead heat_**. But while other campaigns are starting to stall, our momentum just keeps building. When the poll was taken, we had only been on TV for one day, whereas our self-funding opponent has been doing TV, digital, and mail for literally months. Another candidate had been on TV for a full week. **_Voters are choosing us_**.
Since Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez endorsed our campaign last Friday, we have seen a huge increase in donations. In the 48 hours after she endorsed, we raised over $50,000 through over 1,100 individual donations!
I’ve been talking with our campaign manager, Charlie, and it looks like we will be able to significantly expand our campaign budget. That means more digital and TV ads, more texts, and more calls to voters. clean_body: Last week, we got polling showing this race as a statistical dead heat. But while other campaigns are starting to stall, our momentum just keeps building. | | | Friend, ** Last week, we got polling showing this race as a statistical dead heat. But while other campaigns are starting to stall, our momentum just keeps building. When the poll was taken, we had only been on TV for one day, whereas our self-funding opponent has been doing TV, digital, and mail for literally months. Another candidate had been on TV for a full week. Voters are choosing us. Since Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez endorsed our campaign last Friday, we have seen a huge increase in donations. In the 48 hours after she endorsed, we raised over $50,000 through over 1,100 individual donations! I’ve been talking with our campaign manager, Charlie, and it looks like we will be able to significantly expand our campaign budget. That means more digital and TV ads, more texts, and more calls to voters. To meet this expanded budget, we have set an aggressive goal of raising $100,000 in the next two weeks. We’ll still be outspent by our opponent who is self-funding with millions in Big Pharma money, but this new budget will let us close the gap and make sure our message doesn’t get drowned out. If we can hit our new goal, we can keep surging and win on June 23rd. We need your help. ** The polling we have shows us within the margin-of-error for first place, but most voters still don’t know about our campaign. The numbers show that when voters hear our message, they quickly move to supporting our campaign. I am so energized by all the momentum we have, and so excited for the final two weeks of the campaign. We have a grassroots movement behind us, and that’s something our opponents can’t buy with corporate PAC money or millions in self-funding. Together, we’re going to win this thing. name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: Balancing the budget HAS to be a priority
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANET BARRESI FOR CONGRESS
body:
our national debt is at almost $26 trillion | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/20a1c0bc4f3a/calling-all-patriots-12428910?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=fd2e34eb4d&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | Peter,

Kendra Horn recently stated that we need to address our national debt while advocating for spending more money. **Her response is unacceptable.**

Career politicians have gotten us in such a financial hole that it seems almost insurmountable. Which brings me to my point: **we have got to get our budget balanced.**

The United States of America has a spending problem. It is equivalent to having a second mortgage on our house, a second loan on our car and we have maxed out our credit cards.

[**Right now, American taxpayers are on the hook for roughly $26 trillion of debt.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=211d2feb41&e=795c6d9796)

This is because establishment politicians like Kendra Horn go to Washington and join the D.C. club—the club that works to satisfy the donor class and the coastal elites while forgetting all about Mr. & Mrs. John Q. Taxpayer back home.

One of my very first priorities in Congress will be to fight for a balanced budget amendment.

[Will you help us send a true conservative to Washington so we can fight for our kids' future economy? Even if it's** just $5, $15, $25, $50, or even $100. Every penny we earn goes to fight Kendra Horn's leftist millions.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=d3f5c35cd9&e=795c6d9796)
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=7e9db28d9c&e=795c6d9796 "DONATE TODAY")
---
| $26 trillion is a number so high that sometimes it feels like it’s not even real. But this is a reality.

Someday this money has to be paid back. If it isn’t us, it’ll be our kids and grandkids who pay. While it’s not being paid back, while instead it is growing like a cancer, we live under the constant threat of crushing inflation and the need for good credit in a real crisis.

A real crisis like, say, a pandemic. One where we need to borrow a few trillion dollars to stave off a depression. One where we need to shore up our healthcare system while it shuts off all elective care to fight a deadly virus.

We need a fighter during times like this, not a liberal Pelosi rubber-stamp.

As long as Kendra Horn is in office, I can assure you—it will be business as usual.

[**Please consider donating just $5, $15, $25, $50, or even $100 to help fight back against one of Pelosi's top allies in Congress. Thank you.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=15c89fd195&e=795c6d9796)

Best,
[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=3aef64d915&e=795c6d9796) \--Janet Barresi
---

name: Corky Messner
subject: Proud to announce
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
I’m preparing to announce my intent to run against and beat D.C. Jeanne Shaheen. Will you help us? Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/7ac191dd6634180e/9186d6c4a816d76ec3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, **This afternoon, I officially filed as a candidate for the U.S. Senate in Concord!** To continue our momentum after filing, we’ve set an ambitious goal to raise $10,000 before June 16th to put our campaign in the driver’s seat for the Republican Primary. While we couldn’t do the usual State House rally, you can **[watch my statements on Facebook Live!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/7ac191dd6634180e/c2d7e9f08316a965c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** As a successful businessman, proud veteran, conservative and political outsider, I am committed to the American tradition of fiscal responsibility and personal freedoms. I will work tirelessly with President Trump and Governor Sununu to unburden our small businesses, help spur economic opportunity, safeguard our security as a nation, and restore our belief in the American Dream. **Our nation is at a crossroads and New Hampshire needs a real leader to help our nation lead the world through the 21st century!** Jeanne Shaheen has shown over and over that she’s nothing but a rubber stamp vote for Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer. She doesn’t stand for Granite Staters — she stands for socialism. Our nation cannot remain a global leader and beacon of freedom and prosperity if we follow the failed ideology of socialism! _America can’t afford another term of D.C. Jeanne._ **[Will you chip in $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or what you can today to make sure I am in a position to WIN in September’s Republican Primary?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/7ac191dd6634180e/faa90a1b53cd822ec3d6b838967d376c/33153)** I am running to return our country to the freedoms and liberty upon which our nation was founded, and the spirit upon which our state was built. Granite Staters and ALL Americans deserve a Senator who truly reflects their values and concerns. Thanks for your support,
Corky Messner [Donate NOW >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/7ac191dd6634180e/89a4a0c4aece2c6bc3d6b838967d376c/33153) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/7ac191dd6634180e/8b5c34afd1eac8b9c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/7ac191dd6634180e/43d7a83f89939204c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

name: Alex Koren
subject: our students:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17804028/207112212/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2NlNGQyMS04NWFhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yIUGrgv4mf8i0jUAHnkzb2Xh1RQRVcbjy2qmCzYZmFQ=&emci=bb22203a-83aa-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=acce4d21-85aa-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644) **[“Education Secretary Betsy DeVos plans to move ahead with a policy that would boost the share of coronavirus relief dollars to private school students by writing it into a new regulation.”](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17804029/207112213/-677610799?contactdata=TD0fZLgA%2FBfSbTRBPZZ0e2dlpukyBmb%2BthpT3nhHSs8c3Kh%2FkZPgSwcLoJF8G7RLIkv73FMyDNtTxjzEoBcdnhj8vmx12esPgOpK0Gf4zbrwKQ826j9HgN086chzZbrp3LkvAbkLsTscXE3WU3%2BwiQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2NlNGQyMS04NWFhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yIUGrgv4mf8i0jUAHnkzb2Xh1RQRVcbjy2qmCzYZmFQ=&emci=bb22203a-83aa-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=acce4d21-85aa-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)** -Morning Education
Hi there,

As a state representative, Margaret prioritized public school funding and vocally opposed and voted against the privatization of our public schools.

Along with Americans across the country, she has been horrified by this Administration’s gutting of public education, and the latest decision from Betsy DeVos is no different.

DeVos continues to favor private schools in the distribution of COVID-19 relief, further weakening our public schools that are already devastated by funding cuts and often rely on local funding to provide vital curriculum to students.

We desperately need leadership in Washington who will fight for everyone’s right to quality education.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Defund Police, Watch Crime Return
body:
"One feature of our current politics is how quickly bad events trigger a rush to bad policies." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5a3a516a84&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Defund Police, Watch Crime Return**

“One feature of our current politics is how quickly bad events trigger a rush to bad policies. So it is that the response to the killing of George Floyd has sprinted past police reform to ‘defund the police,’” _The Wall Street Journal_ editorial board writes.

“By all means let’s debate other policies and accountability in using force. But a political drive to defund police risks a return to the high-crime era of the 1960s and 1970s that damaged so many American cities.”

**[Click here to read more. ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b0951f590b&e=3ee4985eea)**
---
|
---
| “Vulnerable New Yorkers want more police presence, not less; they view officers as their only protection against predation. What will the activists seeking to defund the NYPD tell these law-abiding residents—that they are now on their own?” Manhattan Institute fellow Heather Mac Donald writes in the _**[New York Post](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8bab384b88&e=3ee4985eea). **_
---
|
---
| “The owner of a manufacturing company based in Minneapolis has decided to move his factory after law enforcement was unable to protect the plant from burning during riots.” He said that the city’s local leaders didn’t “care about my business. They didn’t protect our people. We were all on our own.” Read more in _****_**_[The Daily Caller](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=64fe05f3bd&e=3ee4985eea)._ **_****_
---
|
---
| “Debate is no longer allowed in America’s liberal newsrooms, and the left has the scalps to prove it. James Bennet is out as New York Times editorial-page editor.” Why? Because his paper published an opinion column by a U.S. senator arguing for deploying the military if violent riots got out of control, the _[New York Post](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1807edc9d5&e=3ee4985eea) _editorial board writes.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5a5733d73c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3e13b10cad&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=00d19276bc)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Jerid
subject: counting on 47 people in Alpharetta
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Reverend Warnock's request for you:
Friend: Did you see Reverend Warnock's note?
---
The U.S. Postal Service could run out of money in just _months_ , and the current administration is refusing emergency aid to save it.
Reverend Warnock is fighting to demand Congress take action before it's too late, but he can't do it alone. He needs another 47 Democrats from Alpharetta to join him by midnight tonight - and he's counting on you to be one of them.
**[Please, click here now to sign our petition demanding Congress take action to save the Postal Service.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/SavetheUSPostalService/?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=Warnock&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-priorities-refresh%3Fcode%3Djtk261-ja-nd")**
Thanks,
Jerid
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Reverend Warnock
Subject: re: saving the U.S. Postal Service
| | |
---
Friend,

**The U.S. Postal Service is in _serious_ ****danger:** Postal workers are getting sick, mail volume is dropping - and without emergency funding, this vital institution could be insolvent by September.
**We can 't let this happen, friend.** An insolvent Postal Service would mean 600,000 hardworking people could lose their jobs. It would make it harder for communities across our country - especially those in rural areas - to access lifesaving medications, wages and Social Security benefits. And with millions of voters planning to cast their ballots by mail this November, it could put our constitutional right to vote at risk.
I'm raising my voice to support this essential service, but congressional action is the _only_ thing that can save the USPS from catastrophe - and I need your help to demand it. **[_Please, friend, will you click here to add your name to our petition demanding Congress take action now to save the Postal Service? Since this is so urgent, I 'm looking to get 2,000 signatures by midnight tonight._](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/SavetheUSPostalService/?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=Warnock&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-priorities-refresh%3Fcode%3Djtk261-ja-nd")**
| | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/SavetheUSPostalService/?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=Warnock&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-priorities-refresh%3Fcode%3Djtk261-ja-nd")
---
Thanks so much for raising your voice with me on this critical issue.

Reverend Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e437/288179be/b7e1290/348eb803/3891461520/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia.

On this final day of the campaign,every dollar that comes in goes directly to our critical get-out-the-vote initiative. == == == There's no time to waste, Friend. We have to mobilize our supporters to the polls in these final hours or we won't have the chance to replace Omar's squad with a pro-Trump squad of patriotic, conservative women. If we 're going to take back the House majority from Nancy Pelosi, then I need your help now. We've felt helpless as we've watched the radical Left work to destroy this country. But this is our opportunity to take back control and have a NEW, conservative squad calling the shots. We will fight to secure our borders, protect the Second Amendment, help small businesses thrive, look out for our police officers, take care of our veterans, and ALWAYS put America First. But that can only happen if we mobilize our supporters to the polls and win this election TODAY. == Thank you, == Lisa Song Sutton Paid for by Lisa Song Sutton for Congress | | Lisa Song Sutton for Congress | 4375 N Las Vegas Blvd. #7-201, Las Vegas, NV 89115 | | Sent by mailto:action@conservativepatriots2020.net in collaboration with |

name: Heidi Sloan
subject: Stand with Greg, Defund the Police ✊
body:
| |
---
Friend,
We are living in a moment of multi-racial working-class rebellion against anti-blackness, austerity, and police brutality across our country. We can see firsthand that when we act collectively, whether at work or in the streets, we have the power to change the world.
My friend Greg Casar is fighting alongside our movement to build a more just society. [**Will you support Greg in his re-election campaign for Austin City Council District 4?**](www.casarforcouncil.com/donate?link_id=0&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-stand-with-greg-defund-the-police&email_referrer=email_827153&email_subject=stand-with-greg-defund-the-police)
**Greg and I have stood shoulder-to-shoulder through many fights and he has shown himself to be the kind of leader we need.** He championed the law to _guarantee paid sick days for all workers_ in Austin. He organized alongside a coalition of community groups to achieve a unanimous rejection of the Austin Police Association's contract with the city. Through that victory we were able to _redirect funding from the police to sorely needed social services_ and establish an Office of Police Oversight. He authored the "Freedom City" policies that have reduced discretionary misdemeanor arrests by 75% in Austin. He fought to _decriminalize homelessness_. No one should be harassed by the police because they have no place to go.
---
[ **Contribute to Greg!** ](?link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-stand-with-greg-defund-the-police&email_referrer=email_827153&email_subject=stand-with-greg-defund-the-police)
---
Greg continues to stand for the cause of justice in our city. This week, he is calling for:
* Cutting APD's budget and reallocating funds to housing, healthcare, and community-based safety solutions
* Banning police use of tear gas and banning the use "impact munitions" like rubber bullets and lead-pellet bean bags against protesters
* Banning police use of facial-recognition technology, chokeholds, and shooting at people who flee
* APD Chief Manley's resignation

Thanks to people in the streets across the country we can take a step towards a society that provides for the needs of the vast majority of people and away from militarized, racialized police oppression. **[Contribute to support Greg so that he can continue to fight.](www.casarforcouncil.com/donate?link_id=3&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-stand-with-greg-defund-the-police&email_referrer=email_827153&email_subject=stand-with-greg-defund-the-police)**
In solidarity, Heidi Sloan
---
|
---
_Greg and I during my campaign for Congress in TX 25.
_
---
| | Sent Via [ActionNetwork.org](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/O93kI8o-kT9cRvZ9zJLPP23W7H9qpHR7DTBpQ546uYZCh54DkquyOjNrLOnL52FXuCzxBVjDBYAXUs3aOwuJEaGrxMHiFlYG5_P4UGnD8pT2D6Q1ZprPm9el2d2iH411ymg9n822VD9KqsMtghT5LaIXunA608-tsJMwfgvx-ThMBHLxvgxx5iWxJ7De2CfCRrtfX1pVsa-K6vAbtm2d3Hg_I8S3xCeymOKjuMuiT0SjEjmBaJ6CG4_7bGbPm3PpABunbKaSMT2FrB4dZQXOdw/32h/zceCPcp9Rg2nCEkBoQpv4g/h0/BKl4i5epwNFub4OoAQObM9u4AS1azNP0IU3DwnvusPg). body:

| Friends, **I am very proud to welcome former Speaker of the NH House of Representatives, Gene Chandler to Team Mayberry!** Gene Chandler is a _legend_ in the North Country. He is a longtime State Representative from Bartlett and served twice as the Speaker of The New Hampshire House. [Join Speaker Gene Chandler on Team Mayberry! Click here (secure link)](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDM5OTI4MjQ2MTUyOTkyMDIxJmM9ZTRwNCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTY4ODM0OTAmZD1oMmsweTFk.4sSrQFhuYh1GkBqTiSf7klh6ewBshwMoczSO1UyKMmE) We all know that during tough economic times, the North Country is hit harder than Southern New Hampshire and Speaker Chandler has dedicated his life to ensuring that the North Country is well-represented in Concord. **If I am elected to Congress, I promise that I will follow his lead and be a strong, conservative voice for the North Country and all of New Hampshire when I get to Washington. ** Thank you for your support Gene! \- Matt
---
---
| |
---
| |
---
| “I have known Matt Mayberry for over 20 years. He is a conservative Republican that understands our core New Hampshire values because he shares them. Mayberry also understands Carroll County because he worked up here for some time. Now more than ever, we need someone that knows his way around the Mount Washington Valley.
I’m excited to support Matt Mayberry because he is a true Granite Stater. His word is his bond, he is not one of these Washington types who comes here trying to change everything about our New Hampshire Advantage. He isn’t trying to buy our votes, he is trying to earn them, and he has earned mine. Matt Mayberry is also a decorated Air Force veteran, and you can tell that his commitment to service didn’t end when he took off the uniform. Matt has been elected and served on his local city council and school board. He has raised money for homeless veterans, and homeless high school kids in his hometown of Dover, he has served as Vice Chair of the NHGOP, and helped more Republican candidates up and down the ballot than any other person I can think of. We need someone who is a workhorse, not a show-horse, and someone we can trust to fight for the North Country. Matt Mayberry is running because he wants the work, not the title, he wants the job to help others – not to help himself, I can’t say that about some of the others running in this race. The North Country needs a strong advocate in Washington, and I can’t think of anyone who will fight harder for us than Matt Mayberry. Mayberry will serve with honor, distinction and a dedication toward making our lives better every day. He can count on my support and I hope he can count on yours also.”
\- Gene Chandler

Friend,

Do you have a second to chat?

I wanted to reach out really quickly and talk about a new project my team is launching — the [**Flip the House Fund**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=b5cecf4ac78a41b49668077251f6ae0e&_e=jRpTzaLhgRfVyroFWXa5hdWk6tfo3DeNqOZxKbDE2s4a3Y3ssgLyEwaEiTY3ffrKiHYWeJRuwcYS6zcdN-q7QmQjw2ZvmmGU56ljaioMTioGiHsP0f05IRaUDj2sxnry7PVDh7SE_d-VMi40mSxpaxV1QbMfxNsT_qKZq351JhMdv_grNsXVciLN-RnQ2MkOKiBc8-1u8YtsCdNdnobfsBkpuF-qprQ7TtTEmB8AtdCscTJhma_0PK0t0GwoKTXBxeXavpBx3TAt359eEMfafOdN6gpOyW_VsPE3rGyG6jk1fpmdbXz56e8lNCLyaLHDqDYGUm6qK-2PPby1tjj3ywwBolt_Lhp2q1f-Kq9ocs7aZ-JsWSKMyLNj38G2mp4RJR2A9FVcJb3A88ybOJD7M8csK0Gx4sj4eAEnVzASVXPLXjl-F-U_C5sD2-LnecVObp5DE5GsARukRJFIWbvJAQ37cBp4ybvzEVOzhsdVFKU%3D) — and how it’s going to help us fire Nancy Pelosi and turn the House red in 2020.

The Flip the House Fund is first and foremost a team project. My team started the fund to help elect conservative leaders who are dedicated to rebuilding our economy, bringing jobs back to our shores, standing up to China, and much more.

Winning back the House is going to take hard work and dedication from our team, and most importantly, our grassroots movement. It’s not about just winning my race — we’ll need to pull together and support leaders who have a chance to turn their districts red all over the country and our state.

Over the next couple of weeks, you’ll be hearing from other Illinois leaders who are striving to put the House back to work for the American people. I encourage you to listen to what they have to say and to give to our fund if you like what you hear.

If you want to support any of these great candidates today, you can use this link:

**[https://secure.winred.com/darinlahood/action-1271763/flip-the-House-2020](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=b5cecf4ac78a41b49668077251f6ae0e&_e=jRpTzaLhgRfVyroFWXa5hdWk6tfo3DeNqOZxKbDE2s4a3Y3ssgLyEwaEiTY3ffrKiHYWeJRuwcYS6zcdN-q7QmQjw2ZvmmGU56ljaioMTioGiHsP0f05IRaUDj2sxnry7PVDh7SE_d-VMi40mSxpaxV1QbMfxNsT_qKZq351JhMdv_grNsXVciLN-RnQ2MkOKiBc8-1u8YtsCdNdnobfsBkpuF-qprQ7TtTEmB8AtdCscTJhma_0PK0t0GwoKTXBxeXavpBx3TAt359eEMfafBRMNNzcdHNmdqFXcJfHNI2DAVncJBDkds-d5P3_Yz1r0CgZryajL_8msDI9QtjKNLOYrVYxGzpkTekFJBD5zehGEuPkD82XdDfz5L6EiM84nIQsjrba94rhne0xRyIeT-AsSojRKNFvBmY_9Ph2QlwPPwVxq_wZ22tZ2v21gkqWp0RkbQjq6zDsCHtdV87NV741kl6sp7FPlZxOsLzzDJQ%3D)**

Thank you for your time,

Darin LaHood

name: ANTIFA Update (Jim Banks)
subject: defunding the police?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JIM BANKS FOR CONGRESS, INC
body:
Friends, Last year, I wrote a letter to the FBI director and asked him to add ANTIFA to the list of domestic terrorist organizations. After serving my nation overseas in Afghanistan, it’s clear to me that the tactics embraced by ANTIFA are the same that we see other terrorist organizations employ.
Now, ANTIFA is attacking our police officers and demanding they be defunded... I draw the line.
Let me be clear: **WE WILL NOT ALLOW OUR POLICE TO BE DEFUNDED.** Friend, will you stand with me and **[add your name NOW to oppose defunding the police?>>>](http://links.jimbanks.us/u/click?_t=14b4f09b550c426eb4f913b115f47659&_m=900cfa958df64c7cbed5ab6b329c60f9&_e=_c9Xd43HnDmNLSMF-F7ca1PJdQvAwLJPVrTe6JjTBcvrI5frfyns7iOMUEXvblPatlBqB_eqlwvGhPgFFs-9Dptip-8zL0kRqalaH3EZBytSiw3hZA1uPVhcWT1HXy23aLugjUb80J8HHCu_n-U1dQ85dSb2RvIQKkLvrcswOW8DNUN9ZaRAaMXQk5dhAYKb-I8afN6_aOggSHkrgriycCJMuS4zpZc2-UFk3toJXyjA5hMK-qJE3q9jKh6EXZqPwXoccYNgHZRJ-hNLwRFLSCbmo4Jvwm9Egtzu3ryrVOoNTE502b71Wa4WE8ZvdZhE6BfHB0Zh8s0HerEHBd8FrbY6nVCnDkTrkkDNkaLnSEozMafDk_Jr4ZHufl6TU5A3IsdnhuC9oOBePcDYdvxQmxnbngwbBs5xYmlSyaJ0sL7lsOdY7gR87CzHj9aU81wk)**
Defunding the police is an incredibly dangerous precedent. Our police officers work on the front lines to protect our communities and deserve our support. That’s why I created a petition to show exactly where Hoosiers stand on this issue.
