name: Defeat Disinfo
subject: Don't let Trump tarnish George Floyd’s memory.
body:
He's using George Floyd to tout his own “accomplishments” | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG0wrDB7MtwPLuSSi4jwn1dr2AEKKvrxXLDWyyWUDJ9fIh3cA_yNrSXYaQXjbaKQCTUlofLJ4kmaD8hMQQrIvoxrfFVwq_P1_jqnJRrojYnzMT4djobmLfds1gnMe1fzGUR3Ps7ieOrKDsrcBj4GxJhIDJOCIg-MOoF3gqxZAg6gDACSwCwVc-c5_jWq4h89VxHtDyjnWTfIpRhAXow_r3g2cL1llo2ACRBZnXtq9Yo3__VVIf9f5sx-STQnOEfuOQ3txT7pV8RgsQvBR9ZfrHR4s/32h/aSqN2YhzRjeXy-48P51XAg/h0/aXZRXNEzPbZ4dfc2E0pmg63O6RWy02Ki8z8pKG5kOl4) When a lie doesn’t work, Team, try distraction.

That’s the first rule of the Trump playbook — and exactly what we’re seeing play out right now.

Last week, Trump tried to deny the real grassroots energy behind the protests against police violence around the country, falsely claiming that Antifa and George Soros were secretly behind them all.

That fell flat (in no small part thanks to you helping to spread our counter narrative!), so now he’s trying to turn people’s attention away from the protests by claiming that George Floyd is smiling down on us because of the purported economic recovery. Nevermind the fact that economists have just announced that we’re officially in a recession.

[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0n5Qb5xjaWQ-ETscSkvkipoQ6rgchbOKq9TS-mBWTCzAorJK8Qj9CEuZGGXU8aQ9puAXhg1HbftDh0Kl9nzy6sttQ-DA2q6o_7yoa1DMHCokkXf80K8JCf1gG1ZP-MDzG-iICuQbYSrimo35BudGAlS8-O2z20hmAq0j-GgT3IJLO7DQqaxEE2BSwXvNmW34GfDo7UKmCLco2eFRD9Xr_h5Xi6cgcQjXP9wSP3JqFBGyOdwGv8X5MUQJz8X0GlsgHbh3IiGWlqsZ0p-bUqvVjSY/32h/aSqN2YhzRjeXy-48P51XAg/h1/aHgDHMKwzcnrc3LiI_4k_mVg5chC22QCHwv57-hitk4) Not only is it disgusting that Trump is invoking George Floyd’s memory to tout his own so-called successes; it’s also a blatant attempt to distract us all from both the protests and the brutal police response that he’s been championing.

**[That’s why we want you to help us introduce the world to Tatiana — a courageous young activist who organized and led the protest in her conservative Oklahoma town. Share this post telling her story now!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiJjY49n83ivj1JpSpcqTpqmwRXOung89jFZGwnD1cwy529TAjynaDnGkwY3TsfcK_deRsDpmEeIcC7Nk9uz5rSV03HD1L-niY6Tae9xjJBJeO4dFEsBl_YrRkGQWJqc2wno5188p-jbrvuOYoYlahnXTUlvaSzXg9zp29JRQdznhT8st_06uI7uLGHsJ15UO8kCpERFIuUq72FMuGkzXf3XsPaThB_AjqPkZI9qPjWqWP-uT4f9lcHskAZSO8ygJ3On8b6F-8Er4YaGxfBq-_TQNlpaaag-Mhdj0_0_8GzTKQ/32h/aSqN2YhzRjeXy-48P51XAg/h2/puT8aLUYm9A_5AQJOFRHlv_bdYjpPNsZQJVZdoKtjH0)**

[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiJjY49n83ivj1JpSpcqTpqmwRXOung89jFZGwnD1cwy5wmvFoGn10R8td8eC224y2GufXwo25QsLcars7f03j5obgIOZP4godBoTC2NvFXECDVP27Z4Lp0R5pJNTeS9kxMThZEEcgAFIZyI0Ky8oQOU-0X_wdQ5eiQQA25_7E3-MaZniT9SEit-wzT5KvqNAdqyaqAIcmnY7bY7785eg4_59WH9UbIC31m4t8I5wIhonXToqFUuF6XpAvmQknLXAN3LPcTSk5nMZhvKok6o6AL1Gn3UPMsktSZYD5EdCp3S2Q/32h/aSqN2YhzRjeXy-48P51XAg/h3/aJK_BiFNhyooa5LsJRrOfU_WJaKhyyZ-K5jS-jse4tI) Anyone who’s paid attention to the news knows that there have been huge protests in major metro areas across the country and the world.

What you might not have learned, though, is that this isn’t a case of a red/blue or rural/urban divide. Grassroots activists have organized and led protests in communities of all sizes all across the country: in small towns, in suburbs, in blue states, and in red states.

That demonstrates how pervasive a problem police violence is — and how united the American people are in putting an end to it.

**[Join us in introducing the world to Tatiana and local activists and organizers like her — so no one can claim that the struggle against police violence isn’t a truly nationwide movement.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiJjY49n83ivj1JpSpcqTpqmwRXOung89jFZGwnD1cwy5-YliQVPwjeGGhBaU4NrsYmeTqUIZthAwkMDxPDh-p9IIIMtFCelsENIglRfkqoERLHJJqrQMsE4NpJXF1QVErfn8-UYJ04g-CJ1oHU_mcCtpaw30nsuXSM1lAPHWmXYlGB7tPz4y4wPsRATcmJV0VvNEgCueUksP6UvU_95tTyt9vJgu5u8TfuHgj02-mZ80-CsK8SlUefFre1zQKEgtYhepI3LgDfJuOWsN-SaHaP5v4kh9osw-CSknPQfggfOWg/32h/aSqN2YhzRjeXy-48P51XAg/h4/xh5-EFBGJTgLZxjdDk5SzE-6RCtHDUeTIWG3YdVOzcg)**

Thank you,

The Defeat Disinfo Team

P.S. If you didn’t get the chance last week, please consider contributing to one of the great organizations leading the fight for racial justice. **[You can use this list from President Obama to find the right destination for your donation dollars.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xIsbYIYAaDaVM0NszyqqPOpuVE5NHWilB7LmOdivvZkZ0cTJcamBsar6pNpEdNJJy9c6S2WhcflJaXUbmLokvVaJ4ewOS9uPvcRAYN2cM4fGPO01yn0ZtUsYnwJMJ6ZB-dsE66h10U5clQS8fyBJe46CzYN7ByBwnMG2dvFzXizHr3gqVh8SWT5PNTdpcWBrvN_34w6ku82QB9hXJWgXPWYu9d9VvmFNd5p_a8lVTMr1BHzn5cghYOOjscOt_tNaR2ZwycCc8w1caF87p3U61EGiJDBX_zzdbMFz9BuLznxHDhxam3Kf0nPf7es-Z4B4Vw86_-k3gqN4dS9d54vaRGgn7688vyxNtZmL0xaHqK-sBGaMYAIy2Es6D14YEP13-aa7I9mqG09FfL20Syz1PQ/32h/aSqN2YhzRjeXy-48P51XAg/h5/2S6YbJJ1CAdWZGvX7WHV74limxRJwlfnvzy3PiXQpbc) **

_If you were forwarded this email, you can subscribe to receive these weekly action updates on how to fight Trump's lies[here](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG0wrDB7MtwPLuSSi4jwn1dr1g46P94BplcmiCKSvAkrwSMykqdJtrp0T0yjv2Pr_jBHs97bhKObJB5TAQa4fBfrXe1WYgwIpGQ7M6icIHsh_g64kxkdc9-l-TCU7G9CqYa7k43zK6NWgkdIzrc3sqnZ0YuEjSVMCSupThd-9UZVU0q5HqCyoEuNMLoR-IK7VEdf25gv_DkwnEo2c3I5PPyo6tdlG0NI7N8d6x6mVczqojABcNkih_BqAHfllQXGTf22YIIy6Lcm72xkuzHo032QA/32h/aSqN2YhzRjeXy-48P51XAg/h6/6kkqBRDwHveCkkcBrGsZsa7hD89CmbGyA7YCvQVdyns)._

clean_body: He's using George Floyd to tout his own “accomplishments” | | | When a lie doesn’t work, Team, try distraction. That’s the first rule of the Trump playbook — and exactly what we’re seeing play out right now. Last week, Trump tried to deny the real grassroots energy behind the protests against police violence around the country, falsely claiming that Antifa and George Soros were secretly behind them all. That fell flat (in no small part thanks to you helping to spread our counter narrative!), so now he’s trying to turn people’s attention away from the protests by claiming that George Floyd is smiling down on us because of the purported economic recovery. Nevermind the fact that economists have just announced that we’re officially in a recession. Not only is it disgusting that Trump is invoking George Floyd’s memory to tout his own so-called successes; it’s also a blatant attempt to distract us all from both the protests and the brutal police response that he’s been championing. Anyone who’s paid attention to the news knows that there have been huge protests in major metro areas across the country and the world. What you might not have learned, though, is that this isn’t a case of a red/blue or rural/urban divide. Grassroots activists have organized and led protests in communities of all sizes all across the country: in small towns, in suburbs, in blue states, and in red states. That demonstrates how pervasive a problem police violence is — and how united the American people are in putting an end to it. Thank you, The Defeat Disinfo Team P.S. If you didn’t get the chance last week, please consider contributing to one of the great organizations leading the fight for racial justice. If you were forwarded this email, you can subscribe to receive these weekly action updates on how to fight Trump's lies. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Defeat Disinfo, please .

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Justice Delayed Is Justice Denied
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501144594%2501100464%2b-%2b06-09-2020%2beNewsletter%250115552.18111674.4639953.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501144594%2501100464%2b-%2b06-09-2020%2beNewsletter%250115552.18111674.4639953.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501)
---|---
| | | **June 9, 2020** |
---|---|---|---
| | | George Floyd's murder - and the deaths, abuse, and mistreatment of so many Black Americans - are rooted in the lack of police accountability and the deep, systemic racism ingrained in so many of our institutions across the country. We must change the systems and end the killings - justice delayed is justice denied. That's why I stood and knelt with protesters outside the Capitol and why I'm determined to bring their passion for change inside the congressional chambers.

[Last week, I went to the Senate floor to call for justice and for immediate action in three areas](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15552.18111674.4639953.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2fvideos%2f182768239759532%2f&redir_log=651229093045397) - ensuring police accountability, ending abusive practices, and collecting data to provide transparency. I was proud to join Senators Booker and Harris, members of the Congressional Black Caucus, and Democratic leadership in introducing legislation yesterday to meet those objectives. The legislation would establish mechanisms to hold police accountable, ban abusive practices like chokeholds, establish a national registry to report misconduct, and end virtual immunity from lawsuits. [You can read more about the bill here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15552.18111674.4639953.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d15748QQQ17966417QQQ4640242QQQ7578828%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252foutreach.senate.gov%252fiqextranet%252fiqClickTrk.aspx%253f%2526cid%253dSenVanHollen%2526crop%253d15666QQQ17966184QQQ4640011QQQ7578828%2526report_id%253d%2526redirect%253dhttps%25253a%25252f%25252fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%25252fnews%25252fpress-releases%25252fvan-hollen-joins-booker-harris-in-introducing-justice-in-policing-act%2526redir_log%253d119025513829859%26redir_log%3d967370416542106&redir_log=841902609723372). These measures are necessary to better protect individuals, communities, and all those police officers who do keep their oaths to faithfully protect the communities they serve.

I'm calling on Senate Republicans to act on this bill now. We must meet the urgency of this moment. We can and must do better in this country. Ensuring liberty and justice for all should not be a partisan issue. Together, we must continue raising our voices to ensure we implement the changes required.

While this bill is a crucial first step - our fight does not stop here.

Our system must be centered in restorative justice. We have an obligation at every level of government to uproot and destroy racism embedded within our institutions and social structures with the same kind of deliberate action that put it there in the first place. We must commit ourselves as a country to eliminating deep inequities, including in education, health care, housing, and economic opportunity. And we need to overhaul our criminal justice system.

I'm encouraged to see and hear so many Marylanders speaking out in the name of justice and equality. I will continue working to eliminate systemic racism in all its ugly forms so our nation can live up to its promise of equal justice, equal rights, and equal opportunity for all.
Chris Van Hollen
---
[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15552.18111674.4639953.7517223&report_id=Facebook&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=328155479639284 "Facebook")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15552.18111674.4639953.7517223&report_id=Twitter&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen&redir_log=957640916473241 "Twitter")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15552.18111674.4639953.7517223&report_id=Instagram&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.instagram.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=389295287187292 "Instagram")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15552.18111674.4639953.7517223&report_id=YouTube&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fuser%2fRepChrisVanHollen&redir_log=463627374976326 "YouTube")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15552.18111674.4639953.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fmedium.com%2f%40ChrisVanHollen&redir_log=575666539451239)
|
---

| | | **Voters are ready for a change.**
---
| [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=2215d77bb8&e=5886ca081d)

| Dear Friend, This time last week, the polls were open and those who had yet to vote were standing in long lines to make their voices heard. [**Now, all the numbers are in, and we came through with a resounding win.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=da4600aa2b&e=5886ca081d) Democratic voters are energized and ready to make their voices heard! Just look at the numbers. Not only has Democratic voter turnout increased from the last presidential re-election year, but we have a candidate in Pat whose numbers **are within striking distance of the Republican incumbent, Jackie Walorski.** Jackie has walled herself off from the people she serves, and has planted herself as a guard at the doors of this corrupt administration. Democratic primary voters outnumbered Jackie’s vote total in the primary by almost 2,000 votes. [**Now, all the numbers are in, and we came through with a resounding win.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=fdd59c78c8&e=5886ca081d)****
---
| [INVEST NOW >>](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=b0d13c59d1&e=5886ca081d "INVEST NOW >>")
---
| Indiana’s 2nd District deserves a Congresswoman who understands her local and national responsibilities, and frankly who honors and respects the people of this district enough to bring their voice and values to the floor of Congress. **We know that person is Pat Hackett.**
> “...as a Nation we are engaged in a struggle that exposes that we are in fact not free. Instead, we have ceded our authority as the People to persons at the highest levels of our federal government who are assaulting democratic norms, scientific facts, and basic decency. The knee of white supremacy is on the neck of people of color. Violence against women and pursuit of their subjugation under the law are on the rise. Greed and corruption are gutting our democracy, and more than 100,000 American souls have been lost due to the lack of political will and incompetence of the current administration and its supporters, including the current representative of this district, Jackie Walorski. This is unacceptable, it is un-American and inconsistent with the values of this district.” \-- Pat Hackett
[**It’s time. Please donate today, and send Jackie permanently into retirement.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=5776a5d05b&e=5886ca081d)****
---

name: True the Vote
subject: VOTING ALERT: Report election fraud!
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://truethevote.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=47A77A14A368)

---
| | [](https://truethevote.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=47A77A14A378)
---
| | |
---
| | Friend,

Six states--South Dakota, Georgia, Nevada, North Dakota, South Carolina, and West Virginia--have elections today. If you live in one of these states, please be on the lookout!

As we lead the charge against election fraud and manipulation during these unprecedented times, we need your help.

We’re working overtime to fight back against the left’s push to get rid of voting safeguards - we are recruiting and training poll watchers, communicating with voters, and even suing the states that have opened the door to rampant fraud.

But day-by-day, we see news stories of mail-in ballots never being delivered, states pushing to get rid of voter ID and ballot witness signatures, and poll workers illegitimately turning away voters at the polls.
---
| | [ Problems in Your Primary? Let Us Know! ](https://truethevote.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=47A77A14A378)
---
| | Thank you,
True the Vote

name: Josh Hicks
subject: Chipping away at Andy Barr’s dark-money war chest
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we’re within striking distance of Andy Barr. But we still need your help closing the fundraising gap between our campaigns before the end of June.

---
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17806862/207181222/-1376369069?refcode=20200609_em_fr_closingthegap_all_hdr_ctest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmRjYWRlYy1hMGFhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bzqGvo67L6lR9rk6eI1MF40F7WE5KxcbLOSvQZUPPwk=)
---
| Friends — With just a few weeks left in the month, my team has set a goal to raise $51,000 from online donors before the end of the quarter — June 30. Why $51,000? In the first quarter of the year, Andy Barr outraised our campaign by that amount, but he did it with corporate special interests, rather than grassroots supporters. **From day one, I rejected corporate PAC money. Our campaign is fueled by supporters chipping in $10 or $25 at a time. _[Can you chip in today to help us reach our goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17806864/207181251/-1376369069?amount=10&refcode=20200609_em_fr_closingthegap_all_l1_ctest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmRjYWRlYy1hMGFhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bzqGvo67L6lR9rk6eI1MF40F7WE5KxcbLOSvQZUPPwk=)_** | | [Chip in >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17806865/207181252/-1376369069?refcode=20200609_em_fr_closingthegap_all_btn_ctest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmRjYWRlYy1hMGFhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bzqGvo67L6lR9rk6eI1MF40F7WE5KxcbLOSvQZUPPwk=)
---
Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we’re within striking distance of Andy Barr’s fundraising total this quarter.
But we still need your help to close the gap before the end of June.
We’re at a pivotal moment in our country’s history, and one thing is very clear: we need new leadership in America because our current legislators aren’t getting the job done. We need leaders focused on representing the families of Kentucky, not their corporate donors.
_**[If you’re able, can you pitch in today to help us reach our goal? name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: Catch our ad tonight during Rachel Maddow AND The Daily Show!
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/MZvujWdAN1opj5PsJVcxSopr4zTFa57n5e-mF8dITCw=/DNXf8UfLbbxs2kiDWraK7u17bnyW4Cu9MGg1nEP_cXM=)

Peter,

We did it! Thanks to all of your grassroots contributions, we were able to raise the $10,000 we needed to broadcast our television ad during tonight's episode of The Rachel Maddow Show. In fact, so many people chipped in that we were able to land a _second_ 30-second spot __ during tonight's airing of The Daily Show with Trevor Noah!

Tune into MSNBC before 9:45 PM EST and Comedy Central before 11:15 PM EST to watch!

But before we go on air tonight, we wanted you to be the first to see our new video. **Click the ad below to watch the full, 30-second clip:**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/MZvujWdAN1opj5PsJVcxSopr4zTFa57n5e-mF8dITCw=/OqGu1Bk3Vxc6Kze0na-srNFm9UqeCG2wIGAhNATIKgg=)

Our communities are in turmoil -- we're facing an economic crisis within a public health crisis within a national crisis of police violence and systemic oppression. After over a decade in Congress, Rep. Clarke has done nothing to address the underlying issues that got us here or done anything to prove that she can lead us forward.

Brooklyn deserves better -- that's what this ad is about and what this campaign is about. And with only two weeks to go until Primary Day, I hope you'll join me in fighting for the future Brooklyn deserves.

Best,
Adem

name: Kathy Manning
subject: 100,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
Our democracy is at risk.
|
---

| | In April, Wisconsin went ahead with in-person voting for its primary election. As a result, counties with a higher voting concentration saw higher rates of positive coronavirus tests.

And RIGHT NOW, primary voters in Georgia are experiencing long lines, broken machines, and many have been unable to exercise their constitutional right to vote. **We can 't allow for that to happen on a national scale. We need to institute a universal vote-by-mail option before the November general election.** **100,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED:
[_Add your name now ->_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d32b/3d199a51/2f42b6f4/7364c9d9/2050397156/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200602_a")** Our government needs to work for everyone. But right now, Washington is broken. And there are two major contributing factors: _**dark money in politics and rampant voter suppression.**_ I'm proud to be endorsed by End Citizens United and Let America Vote, two organizations that are fighting to take big money out of politics and protect Americans' constitutional right to vote. Their efforts are more vital than ever as the coronavirus threatens both Americans' health and the integrity of our democracy. [_**Together, we 're teaming up to demand that Congress provide a universal, no-excuse vote-by-mail option before November, but we need 100,000 grassroots supporters to join us. Will you sign our petition?**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d32b/3d199a51/2f42b6f4/7364c9d9/2050397156/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200602_a") Thank you, Kathy |
---

---

| Patriot,
This is why we call them the "radical left." Recently, leftist mobs have been calling to "defund the police" across the United States. [Minneapolis](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mpCjTPWMgXxnozGqbwZEwv42PxbOUDVmbnQ2dqo0GhK_QGSzUiDBINzXxfm1vvm30CoQXZxGyep8_Mwsfh6Dm6S7ugUfLOm6ydXRkzVLPrdVw1RdNsSqK4LwA_SmygZYc5-5vVgse4RUNHykleTrWOfk2X6v3hbnRFqZQXGCL1uQdYpxQt42RvdU1d9broicEpN0rbUAWQo4TmuoeZ9jDc__KvTP9_Ci-WXgQ8kNpVwa2M9JuHqKNhZi4Tng7R5jy1qBz5dzYg4C2PobPcuPLPq0DXwT_AFK&c=BfP1o7bmNxxWZwTRwWOH3DK7HuNDzVBtBkVR-Fhph8Hb-OBmnkM8aA==&ch=0Ch0JDEauIBGvztXwtPPFUQ_Dz7hMhte_dOGbuXYWA1o35PUKsupGQ==) recently caved and vowed to defund and disband their police department, and I'm beginning to worry that more and more cities will follow.
Let's be clear: this is a dangerous and radical proposal that will destroy our country. The scariest part is that Democrat politicians are beginning to give in to these mobs and propose that we actually start defunding and disbanding police departments.

name: Joe Biden
subject: I’m asking, Derek​
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
Our obligation to fulfill the founding ideals of this nation could not be more important right now. | |
---
Hey Derek, When I decided to run for president, I never expected that so much of our campaign would be run from a distance. More than anything else, I wish I could be out on the trail, in the streets, speaking with and learning from supporters like you each and every day. But we have a collective duty to the greater good that extends beyond adhering to social distancing. _We have an obligation to fulfill the founding ideals of this country, and that demands a swift and overwhelming change in leadership._ We now have fewer than five months to achieve that. Put simply: **_It's go time._** My campaign and the DNC have been working tirelessly to transition our most immediate organizing and fundraising efforts online. From expanding our digital organizing capacity to improving our tech and data infrastructure, we are reaching folks all over the country and spreading our message of a better tomorrow. But this requires a tremendous amount of resources, and at this early stage of the election, we cannot afford to scale back our efforts one bit as we take on Donald Trump and the RNC. **Derek, can I count on you to split a $10 donation between my campaign and the DNC today so that we can take back the White House and elect Democrats down the ballot? We are in the fight for the soul of our nation, and we need everyone on board as we enter the early stages of the general election.**

** ** **** ** I’m looking forward to the day when we can get back to connecting in person -- at rallies, town halls, roundtables, and in your community. But staying informed and active throughout this crisis is crucial to Democratic victory in November. **Derek, we cannot afford to wait until this thing is over to take action and organize our communities.** This moment in the race could not be more important. I’ve told you before that this is the election of our lifetimes, and we only have one shot to get it right. **That’s why I need you to commit to supporting our party today.** **Democrats nationwide -- myself included -- are counting on supporters like you to carry out this plan.** **[Please, if you can, split a $10 donation between my campaign for president and the DNC. Any contribution you can afford today will have a real impact on this race, and we can’t win down the ticket in November without your support.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w0MU4tHFs1UFwni_vP9F7XBGSxYH61XAC4GHuU3Q0gHu0iiTruzu2Fx0PENEfgOiPKs874vfvvWPaCUxx1uEcxjDIH2uPAgRdBGHFEIrjtCpZSQmrDzZnFzCzDW7Ixs547r7P1CdpaXwxvBhcHwYXZ0Umsk2bXnpp-imuBSF1JF2OHOoZzzJpe2xwgy-IyeAyGAMzRJqDGgiN13QE__ICVxrw2NjuavkCP_Pm2oh3Hut0TM_tn_Fd7agnBcpd6o-dU6gIr6sVQILjKz9lQda4RqNx70WdQS6ZWKPKEozkjbp4Usa-KMxAmiqx_05Ut3-wRSv6x8EfGntVRfW4BXO2mQ2qBrWSs80NzgqJODfOvAfPXYC7HtETRl_BDdkC9_Kf-z4hrWkPNAcGUqZrKs84y751v2iPG_9FBV95nYOOhAYG0sN6WGZX9XvP4dgFQQJzOBBz6dav2aK2oNWawWEhLlu0MfR4QscjLTtBzw8fnTBYcVxBVCNm8dtbGIBVkHi1cyxfkRNibGBrCqY6VvMJv/32h/KSEt7XGcSzmr24QVIoLzrA/h6/3M3ECQBeuzexB0idHvyNVx4MRkqxIpfVBWRVzT5lXXg)** Take care and keep the faith, Joe Joe Biden P.S. clean_body: Our obligation to fulfill the founding ideals of this nation could not be more important right now. | | Hey Derek, When I decided to run for president, I never expected that so much of our campaign would be run from a distance. More than anything else, I wish I could be out on the trail, in the streets, speaking with and learning from supporters like you each and every day. But we have a collective duty to the greater good that extends beyond adhering to social distancing. We have an obligation to fulfill the founding ideals of this country, and that demands a swift and overwhelming change in leadership. We now have fewer than five months to achieve that. Put simply: It's go time. My campaign and the DNC have been working tirelessly to transition our most immediate organizing and fundraising efforts online. From expanding our digital organizing capacity to improving our tech and data infrastructure, we are reaching folks all over the country and spreading our message of a better tomorrow. But this requires a tremendous amount of resources, and at this early stage of the election, we cannot afford to scale back our efforts one bit as we take on Donald Trump and the RNC. Derek, can I count on you to split a $10 donation between my campaign and the DNC today so that we can take back the White House and elect Democrats down the ballot? We are in the fight for the soul of our nation, and we need everyone on board as we enter the early stages of the general election. I’m looking forward to the day when we can get back to connecting in person -- at rallies, town halls, roundtables, and in your community. But staying informed and active throughout this crisis is crucial to Democratic victory in November. Derek, we cannot afford to wait until this thing is over to take action and organize our communities. This moment in the race could not be more important. I’ve told you before that this is the election of our lifetimes, and we only have one shot to get it right. That’s why I need you to commit to supporting our party today. Democrats nationwide -- myself included -- are counting on supporters like you to carry out this plan. Take care and keep the faith, Joe Joe Biden P.S. There’s still plenty more work to be done, and truth be told, our efforts will only make a difference if we have the resources to sustain them. Donald Trump and Republicans have a war chest and incumbency advantage that we cannot ignore. But here’s the thing: If we rapidly scale up our programs now, act strategically, and plan for the long haul, we have a real chance of emerging victorious.

name: Maya Handa
subject: How to get out the vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
Elections are weird because you can put in hundreds of hours of work, make thousands of calls, have the most compelling message . . . and none of that matters if you don’t Get Out The Vote. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xq2bJJvMDDA0MOWZ1vepKyaUVfCiOBPxee0o02-eR3_amNusD4JAJkBgTa3bhy92q66m8-iKboqKLSLWEjLtGtF6PoL_3puw8IWFa-fr34U-0xUDhrjR5Ze0WcWYnjkJAnsKmD734kfgRh__OOQScWY_ZZLzRfQ4faB6q-RL6ian6zPvZGkwDdrhZ2aYrwEUnBed4vaOjd2eUfx1tSQ51imGFrdg2ZgLK2tPbQhB-iwE6iai2dVpc1VJnkRjbvGHchcd3zccCGPjLFxzWrxk3DWZiMpI7sxiOZd-MvoKr91g/32h/1jt5Q9n1SJiY8zO33B3qWA/h0/46UXnGormOK--HuK0f8PMzKAyNbLv1HsnZFY8gEYbmk) Friend, **** **** **** Elections are weird because you can put in hundreds of hours of work, make thousands of calls, have the most compelling message . . . and none of that matters if you don’t Get Out The Vote. We are 14 days from victory, but you have to make sure that every single Democrat you know votes for Mondaire.
This is one of the most important things I ask you to do: will you forward this email to 10 friends?
**Vote by mail for Mondaire Jones**
1. You should have already received your postage-paid absentee ballot request form in the mail. **[If you didn’t, you can download it here.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/ialRFclk1m8aQoSHofoPUsJk0kMArpbO43kxqBjwRf5F3y1hx3S48ZhNgB2w3uzxaCb8v8KOq63injJnJDUgCIoFsjZjsIUIyrce0rbG3JN997lywZHbT0dgmrUxFohzZJ6l4hNNyw5kRAbqbaXrHKk48B2OmTN4lfRr7bJj2F-0Rove1PTdQFZR6QRUIrKeKUw1WpseFGo3MKRdXSzviVn_kMsCr3mVPxfr3ZIa8YQu82zylY-JdgO7i3HEa2jX/32h/1jt5Q9n1SJiY8zO33B3qWA/h1/p9RrCg6jl72nEoKuOvspK56v5an8YSXrw9GzHS7V3qc)**
2. Fill it out and mark “temporary illness or disability” as the reason.
3. Return your application to the Rockland or Westchester Board of Elections by June 16th.
4. Once you receive your ballot in the mail, vote for Mondaire Jones and then postmark it or hand-deliver it by June 23rd.

_Rockland Board of Elections:_ 11 New Hempstead Rd., New City NY 10956 voterinfo@co.rockland.ny.us
_Westchester Board of Elections:_ 25 Quarropas St., White Plains NY 10601 boe-westabsentee@westchestergov.com
**Early voting for Mondaire Jones**
You can early vote in person for Mondaire at limited polling locations between Saturday, June 13th and Sunday, June 21st.
**[Rockland County: Find your closest polling location and hours of operation.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/BiZFExtmXDMTkWwyNJXJq_jFssqLfAxEDk1Y_ghaAD4Iobb1C2ftmrjVhSAZJH2iauMYpm3dsHfhGAk9WKxAlTEpHQPmt0npf3pyi2IJoJjic7MTmVqp_KnXfkSHYVUtu4fFrAgBtf7ht4g7yuCL7X_ZlxQ2spwO0eCpFOAt9QTy-XmJT-WgkufWHAs1eNPk_Ym7ijit8vb16nR1fyXdqMNRSSBIEnVom9SzOFsN4D9L7VCpRIsXG5lhIFyBxnMnhgEV-pfWlF95o1xL9nBKCCdxHsU0gKuim5jVo9_D7RUtnGcyyR-n29KWjZJYyB_h/32h/1jt5Q9n1SJiY8zO33B3qWA/h2/px2Whlz6OT1pDJD3P2HXofQEs0prHvbteI80RPY3psc)**
**Westchester County early voting locations will be available soon.**
We’re so grateful for supporters like you who sustain this movement. We want every call you’ve made, every text you’ve sent, and every awkward conversation with a family member you’ve had to count -- let’s Get Out The Vote and elect a People’s Champ!
Maya Handa, Digital Organizing Director
[Facebook](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiIehPqLp50aR83p0fofD_ekhRhBB1VQa7ebqL9x_w2EA943FmL3ISkEdgjfPosMKQVJEqgs6Ni76HXXixzu7j5KVDq2FdrugN0uvRpwfSgj9wFqM4vnQ3ANGJLFdGGnWMCSvDimYSEM-87YY0xlkbZVTxHaj-8CUu8czDxway5OSmw3nTLg10GeDk4a1KANzpsPEXnyjAw9cEvL1OtCa8Ti48vYkpDna7BTU0eBVS1Dng/32h/1jt5Q9n1SJiY8zO33B3qWA/h3/V2_fdZife2Zv_VpLN5FiA6zfjydYLMyvacpr7oA1pls) | [Twitter](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhlVeQ7MpruVa0KNw2sbNX7FaHgAq4ezIjM3urw8wX5_wJBzg3R1I6d_NIIqALgRmKgRkZu6dzRxahB-oSnIJ1hpv6zrlNCd5pBBEObcRu0EdwnE-EZ_9yyCTRspfHNdEKp8HolzZD2toR61qd4wkBiEu6Q6byV33vET-3kFEVhRpyBymVTLt5HY3PH5K13HqKmfWRoEgAnS-2UxvGOjxXQKHyOxL8VjmMEKkdlKhpgM0Q_8btgRJBjSky92IqnAUXw/32h/1jt5Q9n1SJiY8zO33B3qWA/h4/SEDYQFFqWK1A1Jak0tCJt3Mali7o5jVT9rEOkxh2I8c) | [Instagram](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDE-osrDsyUs4KS0eRiq-k7SChrnF8iSfFHczcmiKgbnUiZTIuIxpNGkY3s5ZiTcVqHL_NxZnSk8RiRdn01xRk79SqpT3Sur-8HSSFShA6Cef-a67eUrQ3t-9nWnIh-vub6He4isZ8K23JAwNiGkkR-CxOJQ_7-6gXaGWqTbHAu4MtU5ON7kofR07FFkekvs-E20dtAKXfu5nGrRLsjo03rUm66e3fdD9xshkNhqlKM8fpmqACSH2b6_04OWeuLnl9A/32h/1jt5Q9n1SJiY8zO33B3qWA/h5/bsHcW2PccZC66MnpJSmjQKf-iLWw7dpOY78KiA5R2D0)

Friend --

In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[make a donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17807571/207201062/1147193815?refcode=em-200609-all-2-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTA3MDkxMS1hYWFhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hWNRc5xjPvgwyN9m45--QwftidNUYoy1iDbJDGj8_hA=) **to Georgette Gómez’s campaign for Congress. But first, I hope you’ll let me explain why I’m asking, and your support is so important.

Working families across the country are being squeezed to their absolute breaking points. Young people are drowning in student debt. Parents are out of work and struggling to afford rent. Single moms are worried about paying for prescriptions or putting food on the table.

If it wasn’t clear before, this crisis has highlighted the need for big, structural change in this country. Right now, that means stemming the outbreak and ensuring economic relief in the short term. But in the long term, we _need_ to restructure our economy to work for our working families -- not giant corporations and special interests.

Which brings me back to my friend Georgette:

As San Diego’s City Council President, Georgette has a proven track record on key issues like fighting to expand affordable housing and taking action on climate change. She’s spent her career in public service, and has shown great courage and foresight amidst this crisis. I know she’ll be an incredible ally in Congress.

**[I am proud to add my voice to the broad coalition supporting Georgette. Will you join me in supporting her campaign for Congress by chipping in $3 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17807572/207201063/1147193815?refcode=em-200609-all-2-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTA3MDkxMS1hYWFhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hWNRc5xjPvgwyN9m45--QwftidNUYoy1iDbJDGj8_hA=)**

name: Christy Smith
subject: I want to know what you think before our Mon meeting:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

There's a lot going on in our country right now and very little of it is good.

>From protests for racial justice to the ongoing pandemic to the rising unemployment rate, there are no shortage of issues impacting all of us in unique ways.

All the while, we have leaders in Congress who are beholden to corporate interests, not to voters like you.

**That's why I am reaching out to find out how you and your family are doing during this time.**

**[Peter, I would appreciate you taking two minutes to fill out the campaign's issue survey to let us know what's on your mind. We'll be discussing your answers at our team meeting on Monday.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba7f/29776869/9b2a05c/569f3173/3579816485/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MDlfaXNzdWVzc3VydmV5LXMzIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2006_email_christy_issuessurvey?source=em20_200609_issuessurvey-s3")** [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba7f/29776869/9b2a05c/569f3173/3579816485/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MDlfaXNzdWVzc3VydmV5LXMzIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2006_email_christy_issuessurvey?source=em20_200609_issuessurvey-s3") Representatives are elected to Congress to do just that -- represent voters and their interests in Washington.

But we have seen little effort from Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and Mike Garcia to provide us with the solutions and policies we want and need to get through this period of uncertainty and pain.

**I want to hear from you so we can adjust our campaign accordingly and make sure we're focusing on the issues closest to your heart and your life.**

**[So please add your thoughts to the survey -- my team and I will discuss the results on Monday, and we want to hear from you!](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba7f/29776869/9b2a05c/569f3173/3579816485/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MDlfaXNzdWVzc3VydmV5LXMzIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2006_email_christy_issuessurvey?source=em20_200609_issuessurvey-s3")**

Thanks for adding your thoughts -- this is the type of representation you deserve.

\-- Christy

|
[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba7f/29776869/9b2a05c/569f314c/3579816485/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MDlfaXNzdWVzc3VydmV5LXMzIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200609_issuessurvey-s3")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this battleground House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba7f/29776869/9b2a05c/569f314c/3579816485/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MDlfaXNzdWVzc3VydmV5LXMzIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200609_issuessurvey-s3")
---

body:

It culminated in the sudden resignation of the editor. I refused to back down from these radicals and stand by every word I wrote. My editorial calling for a return to law and order caused a total meltdown from the radical left. It culminated in the sudden resignation of the editor.

I refused to back down from these radicals and stand by every word I wrote. But the mainstream media, which is now run by 20-something radicals, is relentless.

The New York Times and liberal media will continue to attack me and President Trump in an effort to advance their radical and dangerous ideas.

Peter, there is another threat looming this November: Sleepy Joe Biden.

Standing up to the Chinese Communist Party is the most important issue of our time. Joe Biden doesn’t know what day it is, he doesn’t know what office he is running for, and he’s been weak on China his whole career.

In order to make sure voters know the truth about Joe Biden’s record, my PAC launched a new ad in critical swing states.

We can’t trust someone as confused as Joe to lead the country through this crisis and to take on China.

Throughout his career, Joe Biden has taken China’s side on trade deals, human rights, and as Vice President, Joe brought Hunter Biden on a taxpayer-funded trip to China to advance Hunter’s personal business interests.

On January 31st, Joe Biden called President Trump’s China Travel Ban “xenophobic.”

Swing voters need to see my new, can you chip in $50, $25, $10 or $5 to help us make more ads telling the truth about Joe Biden? http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2OTIwNDES1&kn=10&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc4MDgwMDA2NQS2&mt=1&rt=0

This November, voters will have a clear choice between the decisive leadership of President Trump or the confused ramblings of Joe Biden.

The liberal mob is determined to defeat President Trump and win back the Senate.

Can you imagine having Joe Biden in the White House and Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi running Congress?

It is truly terrifying. In service,

Tom Cotton

body:

Peter,
The Far Left's new massive attack has hit Maine's airwaves. And while my grassroots movement has helped me prepare for it, we still do not have enough resources to properly fight back.
Last week, a **$2 million dollar ad buy** dropped spreading more lies about me in Maine. In May, I asked you to help me get ahead of this. Today, I need your support to stop the lies in their tracks.
To put things in perspective, this attack has enough funding to saturate Maine's airwaves for months on end. My campaign has yet to see an attack of this magnitude, and they are only getting worse.
When the Far Left invests this kind of money to spread misinformation across Maine, it is our responsibility to respond fast and forcefully. [**So I must ask you this: Can you please chip into my Urgent Response Fund today?**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2OTM0NDgS1&kn=4&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDgwODEzOAS2&mt=1&rt=0) The only way I can stop Chuck Schumer and the Far Left from spreading these lies is with your support. name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Today's COVID-19 data update
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
You might have noticed that today, for the first weekday in a while, Dr. Nicole Alexander-Scott and I didn't hold a press conference to discuss the state's COVID-19 response. Rest assured, we're still working around the clock to keep Rhode Islanders safe. However, as we continue to reopen, we've decided to move to three press conferences a week. We'll be back every Monday, Wednesday, and Friday at 1:00 p.m. In the meantime, I'll still be sending out these daily emails to make sure you have the most up-to-date information.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014eXmOned4vGIGNV5pM9nPiWggjC88ppV8RTb28PfoHcn_PTRx_GeOLS8ayFLCjI5zfB0vPPzdLM2iTgQMCscsE5dNtGxemCCLm2ni5AHCdrG-Sc3A68q-GgyS2PuQTAg0eejF4ewBYVFppLPGb7hOY34goIy_9GdVU9J8Xcohkna76k4dKT9k92DN54NpQoOG9sn7rSd33U=&c=WkGi1jdmCQFg3atf6Mu-CQ5zHTmlvzafNgWhVPkevqOIJdJ90kQg6Q==&ch=psnwprPjPqpDroRRaR_GkRxB7z2X8IDWZod5xP_8mfIZUn6wUANUOQ==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014eXmOned4vGIGNV5pM9nPiWggjC88ppV8RTb28PfoHcn_PTRx_GeOLS8ayFLCjI5zfB0vPPzdLM2iTgQMCscsE5dNtGxemCCLm2ni5AHCdrG-Sc3A68q-GgyS2PuQTAg0eejF4ewBYVFppLPGb7hOY34goIy_9GdVU9J8Xcohkna76k4dKT9k92DN54NpQoOG9sn7rSd33U=&c=WkGi1jdmCQFg3atf6Mu-CQ5zHTmlvzafNgWhVPkevqOIJdJ90kQg6Q==&ch=psnwprPjPqpDroRRaR_GkRxB7z2X8IDWZod5xP_8mfIZUn6wUANUOQ==).
---
| I know that the last few months have been incredibly hard, and I think we could all use some good news right now. A few weeks ago Ryan Golditch, a 4th-grader from Cranston, called Dr. Jim McDonald at the Rhode Island Department of Health with an idea. Ryan wanted to help out the nurses and doctors who are helping keep Rhode Islanders healthy by making them special tools to make their masks more comfortable. The Department of Health worked with Ryan to coordinate, and now Ryan has made two batches of ear savers for our frontline healthcare workers. You can read more about Ryan [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014eXmOned4vGIGNV5pM9nPiWggjC88ppV8RTb28PfoHcn_PTRx_GeOBveXU7DCWmLC7KlA__72JAAJojg48435E22u3aaU_IzjSGlJb12z5Kg6yYHmTI-awr9dKOgrsvotdcARMxrD4NU-httmI5X0v4zgidynrssvArvOgLt9MPbgpKb7a_1VBEG025IdpX4bZHrxMxAI0eAidI_8lHkjJsKfoaT6IGuR_Aw4JbMG-DzkSDVXdLyZDKydNEjrOsN-Q7DcYMDH4rtdkIwD3SZTewMG5k-kKEpssqxEJzyBQ4=&c=WkGi1jdmCQFg3atf6Mu-CQ5zHTmlvzafNgWhVPkevqOIJdJ90kQg6Q==&ch=psnwprPjPqpDroRRaR_GkRxB7z2X8IDWZod5xP_8mfIZUn6wUANUOQ==).
Finally, I have an important favor I need to ask of you. Because we won't be broadcasting the latest COVID-19 information on TV every day, these emails are more important than ever in helping getting the word out about new reopenings, regulations, or risks. Please consider sending this link to your friends and family so that they can sign up for these daily email updates: [lp.constantcontactpages.com/su/eYMG9tf](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014eXmOned4vGIGNV5pM9nPiWggjC88ppV8RTb28PfoHcn_PTRx_GeOBveXU7DCWmL_IoSysWByvx2CfHxQVeRrpx7GcqP7VWt0CbH9_f-hzhS-ueV8gKp9zX6GBLjnCNGx-PaXD37NtF3ijPlGozCOzUXvC4J8Tm877_3fi63l6xqaSdhIZyJT1mwOAlXPoxs9RShXNyqEAB_p-jIWcetarxCyy8Y0HCnuuDBJalKnCCJfMqHZgH1118kLCbRBiJmfjSZFX-78ZDla0wbBtkLzhUTbmQZHV-HN0l8lPk0Hn-Fe7cicBLq8jkFvtROoCsUoJ02-Yvo8ks=&c=WkGi1jdmCQFg3atf6Mu-CQ5zHTmlvzafNgWhVPkevqOIJdJ90kQg6Q==&ch=psnwprPjPqpDroRRaR_GkRxB7z2X8IDWZod5xP_8mfIZUn6wUANUOQ==). The more informed we are, the safer we'll all be.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=0a4b2656-e455-480e-92b3-2ce157b10d8f)
---

Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) in collaboration with

subject: Sign Amanda's Birthday Card
body:

We want to make it special for her, so we've put together a digital card where you can sign her name and leave well wishes for her. **[Click here to sign her birthday card!](https://vote.amandamakki.com/birthday_card?e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=birthday_email_2&n=2)** Amanda truly cares about Pinellas and is working 24/7 to give us the strong leadership we need in Washington. She sets out every day to work as hard as you do, and what better way to show her that you have her back by wishing her a happy birthday! If you sign her card before midnight tonight, we'll be able to share it with her tomorrow! [](https://vote.amandamakki.com/birthday_card?e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=birthday_email_2&n=3) Thank you for your support, and for taking a moment out of your day to wish Amanda a happy birthday! Sincerely,

Team Makki Amanda Makki for Congress
Republican Candidate for Florida’s 13th District
